fields.description: This bits stores text_out_0 that is a part of result text material.

fields.name: TEXT_OUT_3
fields.description: This bits stores text_out_3 that is a part of result text material.

fields.name: MODE
fields.description: This bits decides which one operation mode will be used. 3'd0: AES-EN-128, 3'd1: AES-EN-192, 3'd2: AES-EN-256, 3'd4: AES-DE-128, 3'd5: AES-DE-192, 3'd6: AES-DE-256.

fields.name: ENDIAN
fields.description: endian. [1:0] key endian, [3:2] text_in endian or in_stream endian,  [5:4] text_out endian or out_stream endian

fields.name: TRIGGER
fields.description: Set this bit to start AES calculation.

fields.name: STATE
fields.description: Those bits shows AES status. For typical AES, 0: idle, 1: busy. For DMA-AES, 0: idle, 1: busy, 2: calculation_done.

AES.name: IV_MEM[0]
AES.description: The memory that stores initialization vector

AES.name: IV_MEM[1]
AES.description: The memory that stores initialization vector

AES.name: IV_MEM[2]
AES.description: The memory that stores initialization vector

AES.name: IV_MEM[3]
AES.description: The memory that stores initialization vector

AES.name: H_MEM[0]
AES.description: The memory that stores GCM hash subkey

AES.name: H_MEM[1]
AES.description: The memory that stores GCM hash subkey

AES.name: H_MEM[2]
AES.description: The memory that stores GCM hash subkey

AES.name: H_MEM[3]
AES.description: The memory that stores GCM hash subkey

fields.name: DMA_ENABLE
fields.description: 1'b0: typical AES working mode, 1'b1: DMA-AES working mode.

fields.name: BLOCK_MODE
fields.description: Those bits decides which block mode will be used. 0x0: ECB, 0x1: CBC, 0x2: OFB, 0x3: CTR, 0x4: CFB-8, 0x5: CFB-128, 0x6: GCM, 0x7: reserved.

fields.name: BLOCK_NUM
fields.description: Those bits stores the number of Plaintext/ciphertext block.

fields.name: INC_SEL
fields.description: This bit decides the standard incrementing function. 0: INC32. 1: INC128.

AES.name: AAD_BLOCK_NUM
AES.description: Additional Authential Data block number register

fields.name: AAD_BLOCK_NUM
fields.description: Those bits stores the number of AAD block.

fields.name: REMAINDER_BIT_NUM
fields.description: Those bits stores the number of remainder bit.

fields.name: CONTINUE
fields.description: Set this bit to continue GCM operation.

fields.name: INT_CLEAR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the AES interrupt.

fields.name: INT_ENA
fields.description: Set this bit to enable interrupt that occurs when DMA-AES calculation is done.

fields.name: DATE
fields.description: This bits stores the version information of AES.

fields.name: DMA_EXIT
fields.description: Set this register to leave calculation done stage. Recommend to use it after software finishes reading DMA's output buffer.

fields.name: IN_DONE
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when the last data pointed by one inlink descriptor has been received for Rx channel 0.

fields.name: IN_SUC_EOF
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when the last data pointed by one inlink descriptor has been received for Rx channel 0. For UHCI0, the raw interrupt bit turns to high level when the last data pointed by one inlink descriptor has been received and no data error is detected for Rx channel 0.

fields.name: IN_ERR_EOF
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when data error is detected only in the case that the peripheral is UHCI0 for Rx channel 0. For other peripherals, this raw interrupt is reserved.

fields.name: OUT_DONE
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when the last data pointed by one outlink descriptor has been transmitted to peripherals for Tx channel 0.

fields.name: OUT_EOF
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when the last data pointed by one outlink descriptor has been read from memory for Tx channel 0.

fields.name: IN_DSCR_ERR
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when detecting inlink descriptor error, including owner error, the second and third word error of inlink descriptor for Rx channel 0.

fields.name: OUT_DSCR_ERR
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when detecting outlink descriptor error, including owner error, the second and third word error of outlink descriptor for Tx channel 0.

fields.name: IN_DSCR_EMPTY
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when Rx buffer pointed by inlink is full and receiving data is not completed, but there is no more inlink for Rx channel 0.

fields.name: OUT_TOTAL_EOF
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when data corresponding a outlink (includes one link descriptor or few link descriptors) is transmitted out for Tx channel 0.

fields.name: INFIFO_OVF
fields.description: This raw interrupt bit turns to high level when level 1 fifo of Rx channel 0 is overflow.

fields.name: INFIFO_UDF
fields.description: This raw interrupt bit turns to high level when level 1 fifo of Rx channel 0 is underflow.

fields.name: OUTFIFO_OVF
fields.description: This raw interrupt bit turns to high level when level 1 fifo of Tx channel 0 is overflow.

fields.name: OUTFIFO_UDF
fields.description: This raw interrupt bit turns to high level when level 1 fifo of Tx channel 0 is underflow.

fields.name: DIS_RTC_RAM_BOOT
fields.description: Set this bit to disable boot from RTC RAM.

fields.name: DIS_ICACHE
fields.description: Set this bit to disable Icache.

fields.name: DIS_USB_JTAG
fields.description: Set this bit to disable function of usb switch to jtag in module of usb device.

fields.name: DIS_DOWNLOAD_ICACHE
fields.description: Set this bit to disable Icache in download mode (boot_mode[3:0] is 0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 7).

fields.name: DIS_USB_DEVICE
fields.description: Set this bit to disable usb device.

fields.name: DIS_FORCE_DOWNLOAD
fields.description: Set this bit to disable the function that forces chip into download mode.

fields.name: RPT4_RESERVED6
fields.description: Reserved (used for four backups method).

fields.name: DIS_CAN
fields.description: Set this bit to disable CAN function.

fields.name: JTAG_SEL_ENABLE
fields.description: Set this bit to enable selection between usb_to_jtag and pad_to_jtag through strapping gpio10 when both reg_dis_usb_jtag and reg_dis_pad_jtag are equal to 0.

fields.name: SOFT_DIS_JTAG
fields.description: Set these bits to disable JTAG in the soft way (odd number 1 means disable ). JTAG can be enabled in HMAC module.

fields.name: DIS_PAD_JTAG
fields.description: Set this bit to disable JTAG in the hard way. JTAG is disabled permanently.

fields.name: DIS_DOWNLOAD_MANUAL_ENCRYPT
fields.description: Set this bit to disable flash encryption when in download boot modes.

fields.name: USB_DREFH
fields.description: Controls single-end input threshold vrefh, 1.76 V to 2 V with step of 80 mV, stored in eFuse.

fields.name: USB_DREFL
fields.description: Controls single-end input threshold vrefl, 0.8 V to 1.04 V with step of 80 mV, stored in eFuse.

fields.name: USB_EXCHG_PINS
fields.description: Set this bit to exchange USB D+ and D- pins.

fields.name: VDD_SPI_AS_GPIO
fields.description: Set this bit to vdd spi pin function as gpio.

fields.name: BTLC_GPIO_ENABLE
fields.description: Enable btlc gpio.

fields.name: POWERGLITCH_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable power glitch function.

fields.name: POWER_GLITCH_DSENSE
fields.description: Sample delay configuration of power glitch.

fields.name: RPT4_RESERVED2
fields.description: Reserved (used for four backups method).

fields.name: WDT_DELAY_SEL
fields.description: Selects RTC watchdog timeout threshold, in unit of slow clock cycle. 0: 40000. 1: 80000. 2: 160000. 3:320000.

fields.name: SPI_BOOT_CRYPT_CNT
fields.description: Set this bit to enable SPI boot encrypt/decrypt. Odd number of 1: enable. even number of 1: disable.

fields.name: SECURE_BOOT_KEY_REVOKE0
fields.description: Set this bit to enable revoking first secure boot key.

fields.name: SECURE_BOOT_KEY_REVOKE1
fields.description: Set this bit to enable revoking second secure boot key.

fields.name: SECURE_BOOT_KEY_REVOKE2
fields.description: Set this bit to enable revoking third secure boot key.

fields.name: KEY_PURPOSE_0
fields.description: Purpose of Key0.

fields.name: KEY_PURPOSE_1
fields.description: Purpose of Key1.

fields.name: KEY_PURPOSE_2
fields.description: Purpose of Key2.

fields.name: KEY_PURPOSE_3
fields.description: Purpose of Key3.

fields.name: KEY_PURPOSE_4
fields.description: Purpose of Key4.

fields.name: KEY_PURPOSE_5
fields.description: Purpose of Key5.

fields.name: RPT4_RESERVED3
fields.description: Reserved (used for four backups method).

fields.name: SECURE_BOOT_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable secure boot.

fields.name: SECURE_BOOT_AGGRESSIVE_REVOKE
fields.description: Set this bit to enable revoking aggressive secure boot.

fields.name: RPT4_RESERVED0
fields.description: Reserved (used for four backups method).

fields.name: FLASH_TPUW
fields.description: Configures flash waiting time after power-up, in unit of ms. If the value is less than 15, the waiting time is the configurable value; Otherwise, the waiting time is twice the configurable value.

fields.name: DIS_DOWNLOAD_MODE
fields.description: Set this bit to disable download mode (boot_mode[3:0] = 0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 7).

fields.name: DIS_LEGACY_SPI_BOOT
fields.description: Set this bit to disable Legacy SPI boot mode (boot_mode[3:0] = 4).

fields.name: UART_PRINT_CHANNEL
fields.description: Selectes the default UART print channel. 0: UART0. 1: UART1.

fields.name: FLASH_ECC_MODE
fields.description: Set ECC mode in ROM, 0: ROM would Enable Flash ECC 16to18 byte mode. 1:ROM would use 16to17 byte mode.

fields.name: DIS_USB_DOWNLOAD_MODE
fields.description: Set this bit to disable UART download mode through USB.

fields.name: ENABLE_SECURITY_DOWNLOAD
fields.description: Set this bit to enable secure UART download mode.

fields.name: UART_PRINT_CONTROL
fields.description: Set the default UARTboot message output mode. 00: Enabled. 01: Enabled when GPIO8 is low at reset. 10: Enabled when GPIO8 is high at reset. 11:disabled.

fields.name: PIN_POWER_SELECTION
fields.description: GPIO33-GPIO37 power supply selection in ROM code. 0: VDD3P3_CPU. 1: VDD_SPI.

fields.name: FLASH_TYPE
fields.description: Set the maximum lines of SPI flash. 0: four lines. 1: eight lines.

fields.name: FLASH_PAGE_SIZE
fields.description: Set Flash page size.

fields.name: FLASH_ECC_EN
fields.description: Set 1 to enable ECC for flash boot.

fields.name: FORCE_SEND_RESUME
fields.description: Set this bit to force ROM code to send a resume command during SPI boot.

fields.name: SECURE_VERSION
fields.description: Secure version (used by ESP-IDF anti-rollback feature).

fields.name: RPT4_RESERVED1
fields.description: Reserved (used for four backups method).

fields.name: RPT4_RESERVED4
fields.description: Reserved (used for four backups method).

The most significant bit is used to indicate this operation occurs in which one icache.

fields.description: reserved

fields.name: INT_ENA
fields.description: set bit 13 to enable CPU interrupt. set bit 14 to enable CPU(not shielded) interrupt.

fields.name: SYNC2_BYPASS
fields.description: set GPIO input_sync2 signal mode. 0:disable. 1:trigger at negedge. 2or3:trigger at posedge.

fields.name: PAD_DRIVER
fields.description: set this bit to select pad driver. 1:open-drain. 0:normal.

fields.name: SYNC1_BYPASS
fields.description: set GPIO input_sync1 signal mode. 0:disable. 1:trigger at negedge. 2or3:trigger at posedge.

fields.name: INT_TYPE
fields.description: set this value to choose interrupt mode. 0:disable GPIO interrupt. 1:trigger at posedge. 2:trigger at negedge. 3:trigger at any edge. 4:valid at low level. 5:valid at high level

fields.name: WAKEUP_ENABLE
fields.description: set this bit to enable GPIO wakeup.(can only wakeup CPU from Light-sleep Mode)

fields.name: IN_SEL
fields.description: set this value: s=0-53: connect GPIO[s] to this port. s=0x38: set this port always high level. s=0x3C: set this port always low level.

fields.name: IN_INV_SEL
fields.description: set this bit to invert input signal. 1:invert. 0:not invert.

fields.name: SEL
fields.description: set this bit to bypass GPIO. 1:do not bypass GPIO. 0:bypass GPIO.

fields.name: OUT_SEL
fields.description: The value of the bits: 0<=s<=256. Set the value to select output signal. s=0-255: output of GPIO[n] equals input of peripheral[s]. s=256: output of GPIO[n] equals GPIO_OUT_REG[n].

fields.name: INV_SEL
fields.description: set this bit to invert output signal.1:invert.0:not invert.

fields.name: OEN_SEL
fields.description: set this bit to select output enable signal.1:use GPIO_ENABLE_REG[n] as output enable signal.0:use peripheral output enable signal.

fields.name: OEN_INV_SEL
fields.description: set this bit to invert output enable signal.1:invert.0:not invert.

fields.name: OUT_SEL
fields.description: The value of the bits: 0<=s<=256. Set the value to select output signal. s=0-255: output of GPIO[n] equals input of peripheral[s]. s=256: output of GPIO[n] equals GPIO_OUT_REG[n].

fields.name: INV_SEL
fields.description: set this bit to invert output signal.1:invert.0:not invert.

fields.name: OEN_SEL
fields.description: set this bit to select output enable signal.1:use GPIO_ENABLE_REG[n] as output enable signal.0:use peripheral output enable signal.

fields.name: OEN_INV_SEL
fields.description: set this bit to invert output enable signal.1:invert.0:not invert.

fields.name: OUT_SEL
fields.description: The value of the bits: 0<=s<=256. Set the value to select output signal. s=0-255: output of GPIO[n] equals input of peripheral[s]. s=256: output of GPIO[n] equals GPIO_OUT_REG[n].

fields.name: INV_SEL
fields.description: set this bit to invert output signal.1:invert.0:not invert.

fields.name: OEN_SEL
fields.description: set this bit to select output enable signal.1:use GPIO_ENABLE_REG[n] as output enable signal.0:use peripheral output enable signal.

fields.name: OEN_INV_SEL

fields.name: RX_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt status bit  for the i2s_rx_done_int interrupt

fields.name: TX_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt status bit  for the i2s_tx_done_int interrupt

fields.name: RX_HUNG_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt status bit  for the i2s_rx_hung_int interrupt

fields.name: TX_HUNG_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt status bit  for the i2s_tx_hung_int interrupt

fields.name: RX_DONE_INT_ST
fields.description: The masked interrupt status bit  for the i2s_rx_done_int interrupt

fields.name: TX_DONE_INT_ST
fields.description: The masked interrupt status bit  for the i2s_tx_done_int interrupt

fields.name: RX_HUNG_INT_ST
fields.description: The masked interrupt status bit  for the i2s_rx_hung_int interrupt

fields.name: TX_HUNG_INT_ST
fields.description: The masked interrupt status bit  for the i2s_tx_hung_int interrupt

fields.name: RX_DONE_INT_ENA
fields.description: The interrupt enable bit  for the i2s_rx_done_int interrupt

fields.name: TX_DONE_INT_ENA
fields.description: The interrupt enable bit  for the i2s_tx_done_int interrupt

fields.name: RX_HUNG_INT_ENA
fields.description: The interrupt enable bit  for the i2s_rx_hung_int interrupt

fields.name: TX_HUNG_INT_ENA
fields.description: The interrupt enable bit  for the i2s_tx_hung_int interrupt

fields.name: RX_DONE_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the i2s_rx_done_int interrupt

fields.name: TX_DONE_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the i2s_tx_done_int interrupt

fields.name: RX_HUNG_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the i2s_rx_hung_int interrupt

fields.name: TX_HUNG_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the i2s_tx_hung_int interrupt

fields.name: RX_RESET
fields.description: Set this bit to reset receiver

fields.name: RX_FIFO_RESET
fields.description: Set this bit to reset Rx AFIFO

fields.name: RX_START
fields.description: Set this bit to start receiving data

fields.name: RX_SLAVE_MOD
fields.description: Set this bit to enable slave receiver mode

fields.name: RX_MONO
fields.description: Set this bit to enable receiver  in mono mode

fields.name: RX_BIG_ENDIAN
fields.description: I2S Rx byte endian, 1: low addr value to high addr. 0: low addr with low addr value.

fields.name: RX_UPDATE
fields.description: Set 1 to update I2S RX registers from APB clock domain to I2S RX clock domain. This bit will be cleared by hardware after update register done.

fields.name: RX_MONO_FST_VLD
fields.description: 1: The first channel data value is valid in I2S RX mono mode.   0: The second channel data value is valid in I2S RX mono mode.

fields.name: RX_PCM_CONF
fields.description: I2S RX compress/decompress configuration bit. & 0 (atol): A-Law decompress, 1 (ltoa) : A-Law compress, 2 (utol) : u-Law decompress, 3 (ltou) : u-Law compress. &

fields.name: RX_PCM_BYPASS
fields.description: Set this bit to bypass Compress/Decompress module for received data.

fields.name: RX_STOP_MODE
fields.description: 0  : I2S Rx only stop when reg_rx_start is cleared.   1: Stop when reg_rx_start is 0 or in_suc_eof is 1.   2:  Stop I2S RX when reg_rx_start is 0 or RX FIFO is full.

fields.name: RX_LEFT_ALIGN
fields.description: 1: I2S RX left alignment mode. 0: I2S RX right alignment mode.

fields.name: RX_24_FILL_EN
fields.description: 1: store 24 channel bits to 32 bits. 0:store 24 channel bits to 24 bits.

fields.name: RX_WS_IDLE_POL
fields.description: 0: WS should be 0 when receiving left channel data, and WS is 1in right channel.  1: WS should be 1 when receiving left channel data, and WS is 0in right channel.

fields.name: RX_BIT_ORDER
fields.description: I2S Rx bit endian. 1:small endian, the LSB is received first. 0:big endian, the MSB is received first.

fields.name: RX_TDM_EN
fields.description: 1: Enable I2S TDM Rx mode . 0: Disable.

fields.name: RX_PDM_EN
fields.description: 1: Enable I2S PDM Rx mode . 0: Disable.

fields.name: TX_RESET
fields.description: Set this bit to reset transmitter

fields.name: TX_FIFO_RESET
fields.description: Set this bit to reset Tx AFIFO

fields.name: TX_START
fields.description: Set this bit to start transmitting data

fields.name: TX_SLAVE_MOD
fields.description: Set this bit to enable slave transmitter mode

fields.name: TX_MONO
fields.description: Set this bit to enable transmitter in mono mode

fields.name: TX_CHAN_EQUAL
fields.description: 1: The value of Left channel data is equal to the value of right channel data in I2S TX mono mode or TDM channel select mode. 0: The invalid channel data is reg_i2s_single_data in I2S TX mono mode or TDM channel select mode.

fields.name: TX_BIG_ENDIAN
fields.description: I2S Tx byte endian, 1: low addr value to high addr.  0: low addr with low addr value.

fields.name: TX_UPDATE
fields.description: Set 1 to update I2S TX registers from APB clock domain to I2S TX clock domain. This bit will be cleared by hardware after update register done.

fields.name: TX_MONO_FST_VLD
fields.description: 1: The first channel data value is valid in I2S TX mono mode.   0: The second channel data value is valid in I2S TX mono mode.

fields.name: TX_PCM_CONF
fields.description: I2S TX compress/decompress configuration bit. & 0 (atol): A-Law decompress, 1 (ltoa) : A-Law compress, 2 (utol) : u-Law decompress, 3 (ltou) : u-Law compress. &

fields.name: TX_PCM_BYPASS
fields.description: Set this bit to bypass  Compress/Decompress module for transmitted data.

fields.name: TX_STOP_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to stop disable output BCK signal and WS signal when tx FIFO is emtpy

fields.name: TX_LEFT_ALIGN
fields.description: 1: I2S TX left alignment mode. 0: I2S TX right alignment mode.

fields.name: TX_24_FILL_EN
fields.description: 1: Sent 32 bits in 24 channel bits mode. 0: Sent 24 bits in 24 channel bits mode

fields.name: TX_WS_IDLE_POL
fields.description: 0: WS should be 0 when sending left channel data, and WS is 1in right channel.  1: WS should be 1 when sending left channel data, and WS is 0in right channel.

fields.name: TX_BIT_ORDER
fields.description: I2S Tx bit endian. 1:small endian, the LSB is sent first. 0:big endian, the MSB is sent first.

fields.name: TX_TDM_EN
fields.description: 1: Enable I2S TDM Tx mode . 0: Disable.

fields.name: TX_PDM_EN
fields.description: 1: Enable I2S PDM Tx mode . 0: Disable.

fields.name: TX_CHAN_MOD
fields.description: I2S transmitter channel mode configuration bits.

fields.name: SIG_LOOPBACK
fields.description: Enable signal loop back mode with transmitter module and receiver module sharing the same WS and BCK signals.

fields.name: RX_TDM_WS_WIDTH
fields.description: The width of rx_ws_out in TDM mode is (I2S_RX_TDM_WS_WIDTH[6:0] +1) * T_bck

fields.name: RX_BCK_DIV_NUM
fields.description: Bit clock configuration bits in receiver mode.

fields.name: RX_BITS_MOD
fields.description: Set the bits to configure the valid data bit length of I2S receiver channel. 7: all the valid channel data is in 8-bit-mode. 15: all the valid channel data is in 16-bit-mode. 23: all the valid channel data is in 24-bit-mode. 31:all the valid channel data is in 32-bit-mode.

fields.name: RX_HALF_SAMPLE_BITS
fields.description: I2S Rx half sample bits -1.

fields.name: RX_TDM_CHAN_BITS
fields.description: The Rx bit number for each channel minus 1in TDM mode.

fields.name: RX_MSB_SHIFT
fields.description: Set this bit to enable receiver in Phillips standard mode

fields.name: TX_TDM_WS_WIDTH
fields.description: The width of tx_ws_out in TDM mode is (I2S_TX_TDM_WS_WIDTH[6:0] +1) * T_bck

fields.name: TX_BCK_DIV_NUM
fields.description: Bit clock configuration bits in transmitter mode.

fields.name: TX_BITS_MOD
fields.description: Set the bits to configure the valid data bit length of I2S transmitter channel. 7: all the valid channel data is in 8-bit-mode. 15: all the valid channel data is in 16-bit-mode. 23: all the valid channel data is in 24-bit-mode. 31:all the valid channel data is in 32-bit-mode.

fields.name: TX_HALF_SAMPLE_BITS
fields.description: I2S Tx half sample bits -1.

fields.name: TX_TDM_CHAN_BITS
fields.description: The Tx bit number for each channel minus 1in TDM mode.

fields.name: TX_MSB_SHIFT
fields.description: Set this bit to enable transmitter in Phillips standard mode

fields.name: TX_BCK_NO_DLY
fields.description: 1: BCK is not delayed to generate pos/neg edge in master mode. 0: BCK is delayed to generate pos/neg edge in master mode.

fields.name: RX_CLKM_DIV_NUM
fields.description: Integral I2S clock divider value

fields.name: RX_CLK_ACTIVE
fields.description: I2S Rx module clock enable signal.

fields.name: RX_CLK_SEL
fields.description: Select I2S Rx module source clock. 0: no clock. 1: APLL. 2: CLK160. 3: I2S_MCLK_in.

fields.name: MCLK_SEL
fields.description: 0: UseI2S Tx module clock as I2S_MCLK_OUT.  1: UseI2S Rx module clock as I2S_MCLK_OUT.

fields.name: TX_CLKM_DIV_NUM
fields.description: Integral I2S TX clock divider value. f_I2S_CLK = f_I2S_CLK_S/(N+b/a). There will be (a-b) * n-div and b * (n+1)-div.  So the average combination will be:  for b <= a/2, z * [x * n-div + (n+1)-div] + y * n-div. For b > a/2, z * [n-div + x * (n+1)-div] + y * (n+1)-div.

fields.name: TX_CLK_ACTIVE
fields.description: I2S Tx module clock enable signal.

fields.name: TX_CLK_SEL
fields.description: Select I2S Tx module source clock. 0: XTAL clock. 1: APLL. 2: CLK160. 3: I2S_MCLK_in.

fields.name: CLK_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable clk gate

I2S0.name: RX_CLKM_DIV_CONF
I2S0.description: I2S RX module clock divider configure register

fields.name: RX_CLKM_DIV_Z
fields.description: For b <= a/2, the value of I2S_RX_CLKM_DIV_Z is b. For b > a/2, the value of I2S_RX_CLKM_DIV_Z is (a-b).

fields.name: RX_CLKM_DIV_Y
fields.description: For b <= a/2, the value of I2S_RX_CLKM_DIV_Y is (a%b) . For b > a/2, the value of I2S_RX_CLKM_DIV_Y is (a%(a-b)).

fields.name: RX_CLKM_DIV_X
fields.description: For b <= a/2, the value of I2S_RX_CLKM_DIV_X is (a/b) - 1. For b > a/2, the value of I2S_RX_CLKM_DIV_X is (a/(a-b)) - 1.

fields.name: RX_CLKM_DIV_YN1
fields.description: For b <= a/2, the value of I2S_RX_CLKM_DIV_YN1 is 0 . For b > a/2, the value of I2S_RX_CLKM_DIV_YN1 is 1.

I2S0.name: TX_CLKM_DIV_CONF
I2S0.description: I2S TX module clock divider configure register

fields.name: TX_CLKM_DIV_Z
fields.description: For b <= a/2, the value of I2S_TX_CLKM_DIV_Z is b. For b > a/2, the value of I2S_TX_CLKM_DIV_Z is (a-b).

fields.name: TX_CLKM_DIV_Y
fields.description: For b <= a/2, the value of I2S_TX_CLKM_DIV_Y is (a%b) . For b > a/2, the value of I2S_TX_CLKM_DIV_Y is (a%(a-b)).

fields.name: TX_CLKM_DIV_X
fields.description: For b <= a/2, the value of I2S_TX_CLKM_DIV_X is (a/b) - 1. For b > a/2, the value of I2S_TX_CLKM_DIV_X is (a/(a-b)) - 1.

fields.name: TX_CLKM_DIV_YN1
fields.description: For b <= a/2, the value of I2S_TX_CLKM_DIV_YN1 is 0 . For b > a/2, the value of I2S_TX_CLKM_DIV_YN1 is 1.

fields.name: TX_PDM_HP_BYPASS

fields.name: TX_PDM_SINC_OSR2

fields.name: TX_PDM_PRESCALE

fields.name: TX_PDM_SINC_IN_SHIFT

fields.name: PCM2PDM_CONV_EN

fields.name: TX_PDM_FS

fields.name: TX_IIR_HP_MULT12_5

fields.description: 1: Enable the valid data output of I2S TX TDM channel 14. 0:  Disable, just output 0 in this channel.

fields.name: TX_TDM_CHAN15_EN
fields.description: 1: Enable the valid data output of I2S TX TDM channel 15. 0:  Disable, just output 0 in this channel.

fields.name: TX_TDM_TOT_CHAN_NUM
fields.description: The total channel number of I2S TX TDM mode.

fields.name: TX_TDM_SKIP_MSK_EN
fields.description: When DMA TX buffer stores the data of (REG_TX_TDM_TOT_CHAN_NUM + 1)  channels, and only the data of the enabled channels is sent, then this bit should be set. Clear it when all the data stored in DMA TX buffer is for enabled channels.

fields.name: RX_SD_IN_DM
fields.description: The delay mode of I2S Rx SD input signal. 0: bypass. 1: delay by pos edge.  2: delay by neg edge. 3: not used.

fields.name: RX_WS_OUT_DM
fields.description: The delay mode of I2S Rx WS output signal. 0: bypass. 1: delay by pos edge.  2: delay by neg edge. 3: not used.

fields.name: RX_BCK_OUT_DM
fields.description: The delay mode of I2S Rx BCK output signal. 0: bypass. 1: delay by pos edge.  2: delay by neg edge. 3: not used.

fields.name: RX_WS_IN_DM
fields.description: The delay mode of I2S Rx WS input signal. 0: bypass. 1: delay by pos edge.  2: delay by neg edge. 3: not used.

fields.name: RX_BCK_IN_DM
fields.description: The delay mode of I2S Rx BCK input signal. 0: bypass. 1: delay by pos edge.  2: delay by neg edge. 3: not used.

fields.name: TX_SD_OUT_DM
fields.description: The delay mode of I2S TX SD output signal. 0: bypass. 1: delay by pos edge.  2: delay by neg edge. 3: not used.

fields.name: TX_SD1_OUT_DM
fields.description: The delay mode of I2S TX SD1 output signal. 0: bypass. 1: delay by pos edge.  2: delay by neg edge. 3: not used.

fields.name: TX_WS_OUT_DM
fields.description: The delay mode of I2S TX WS output signal. 0: bypass. 1: delay by pos edge.  2: delay by neg edge. 3: not used.

fields.name: TX_BCK_OUT_DM
fields.description: The delay mode of I2S TX BCK output signal. 0: bypass. 1: delay by pos edge.  2: delay by neg edge. 3: not used.

fields.name: TX_WS_IN_DM
fields.description: The delay mode of I2S TX WS input signal. 0: bypass. 1: delay by pos edge.  2: delay by neg edge. 3: not used.

fields.name: TX_BCK_IN_DM
fields.description: The delay mode of I2S TX BCK input signal. 0: bypass. 1: delay by pos edge.  2: delay by neg edge. 3: not used.

fields.name: LC_FIFO_TIMEOUT
fields.description: the i2s_tx_hung_int interrupt or the i2s_rx_hung_int interrupt will be triggered when fifo hung counter is equal to this value

fields.name: LC_FIFO_TIMEOUT_SHIFT
fields.description: The bits are used to scale tick counter threshold. The tick counter is reset when counter value >= 88000/2^i2s_lc_fifo_timeout_shift

fields.name: LC_FIFO_TIMEOUT_ENA
fields.description: The enable bit for FIFO timeout

I2S0.name: RXEOF_NUM
I2S0.description: I2S RX data number control register.

fields.name: RX_EOF_NUM
fields.description: The receive data bit length is (I2S_RX_BITS_MOD[4:0] + 1) * (REG_RX_EOF_NUM[11:0] + 1) . It will trigger in_suc_eof interrupt in the configured DMA RX channel.

fields.name: SINGLE_DATA
fields.description: The configured constant channel data to be sent out.

fields.name: TX_IDLE
fields.description: 1: i2s_tx is idle state. 0: i2s_tx is working.

fields.name: DATE
fields.description: I2S version control register

IO_MUX.name: PIN_CTRL
IO_MUX.description: Clock Output Configuration Register

fields.name: CLK_OUT1
fields.description: If you want to output clock for I2S to CLK_OUT_out1, set this register to 0x0. CLK_OUT_out1 can be found in peripheral output signals.

fields.name: CLK_OUT2
fields.description: If you want to output clock for I2S to CLK_OUT_out2, set this register to 0x0. CLK_OUT_out2 can be found in peripheral output signals.

fields.name: CLK_OUT3
fields.description: If you want to output clock for I2S to CLK_OUT_out3, set this register to 0x0. CLK_OUT_out3 can be found in peripheral output signals.

IO_MUX.name: GPIO0
IO_MUX.description: IO MUX Configure Register for pad XTAL_32K_P

fields.name: MCU_OE
fields.description: Output enable of the pad in sleep mode. 1: output enabled; 0: output disabled.

fields.name: SLP_SEL
fields.description: Sleep mode selection of this pad. Set to 1 to put the pad in pad mode.

fields.name: MCU_WPD
fields.description: Pull-down enable of the pad in sleep mode. 1: internal pull-down enabled; 0: internal pull-down disabled.

fields.name: MCU_WPU
fields.description: Pull-up enable of the pad during sleep mode. 1: internal pull-up enabled; 0: internal pull-up disabled.

fields.name: MCU_IE
fields.description: Input enable of the pad during sleep mode. 1: input enabled; 0: input disabled.

fields.name: FUN_WPD
fields.description: Pull-down enable of the pad. 1: internal pull-down enabled; 0: internal pull-down disabled.

fields.name: FUN_WPU
fields.description: Pull-up enable of the pad. 1: internal pull-up enabled; 0: internal pull-up disabled.

fields.name: FUN_IE
fields.description: Input enable of the pad. 1: input enabled; 0: input disabled.

fields.name: FUN_DRV
fields.description: Select the drive strength of the pad. 0: ~5 mA; 1: ~10mA; 2: ~20mA; 3: ~40mA.

fields.name: MCU_SEL
fields.description: Select IO MUX function for this signal. 0: Select Function 1; 1: Select Function 2; etc.

fields.name: FILTER_EN
fields.description: Enable filter for pin input signals. 1: Filter enabled; 2: Filter disabled.

fields.name: FDUMMY_OUT
fields.description: In the dummy phase the signal level of spi is output by the spi controller.

fields.name: FCMD_DUAL
fields.description: Apply 2 signals during command phase 1:enable 0: disable

fields.name: FCMD_QUAD
fields.description: Apply 4 signals during command phase 1:enable 0: disable

fields.name: FASTRD_MODE
fields.description: This bit enable the bits: spi_mem_fread_qio, spi_mem_fread_dio, spi_mem_fread_qout and spi_mem_fread_dout. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FREAD_DUAL
fields.description: In the read operations, read-data phase apply 2 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: Q_POL
fields.description: The bit is used to set MISO line polarity, 1: high 0, low

fields.name: D_POL
fields.description: The bit is used to set MOSI line polarity, 1: high 0, low

fields.name: FREAD_QUAD
fields.description: In the read operations read-data phase apply 4 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: WP
fields.description: Write protect signal output when SPI is idle.  1: output high, 0: output low.

fields.name: FREAD_DIO
fields.description: In the read operations address phase and read-data phase apply 2 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FREAD_QIO
fields.description: In the read operations address phase and read-data phase apply 4 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: CLK_MODE
fields.description: SPI clock mode bits. 0: SPI clock is off when CS inactive 1: SPI clock is delayed one cycle after CS inactive 2: SPI clock is delayed two cycles after CS inactive 3: SPI clock is alwasy on.

fields.name: RXFIFO_RST
fields.description: SPI0 RX FIFO reset signal.

fields.name: CS_SETUP_TIME
fields.description: (cycles-1) of prepare phase by spi clock this bits are combined with spi_mem_cs_setup bit.

fields.name: CS_HOLD_TIME
fields.description: Spi cs signal is delayed to inactive by spi clock this bits are combined with spi_mem_cs_hold bit.

fields.name: CS_HOLD_DELAY
fields.description: These bits are used to set the minimum CS high time tSHSL between SPI burst transfer when accesses to flash. tSHSL is (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY[5:0] + 1) MSPI core clock cycles.

fields.name: SYNC_RESET
fields.description: The FSM will be reset.

fields.name: CLKCNT_L
fields.description: In the master mode it must be equal to spi_mem_clkcnt_N.

fields.name: CLKCNT_H
fields.description: In the master mode it must be floor((spi_mem_clkcnt_N+1)/2-1).

fields.name: CLKCNT_N
fields.description: In the master mode it is the divider of spi_mem_clk. So spi_mem_clk frequency is system/(spi_mem_clkcnt_N+1)

fields.name: CLK_EQU_SYSCLK
fields.description: Set this bit in 1-division mode.

fields.name: CS_HOLD
fields.description: spi cs keep low when spi is in  done  phase. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: CS_SETUP
fields.description: spi cs is enable when spi is in  prepare  phase. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: CK_OUT_EDGE
fields.description: the bit combined with spi_mem_mosi_delay_mode bits to set mosi signal delay mode.

fields.name: USR_DUMMY_IDLE
fields.description: spi clock is disable in dummy phase when the bit is enable.

fields.name: USR_DUMMY
fields.description: This bit enable the dummy phase of an operation.

fields.name: USR_DUMMY_CYCLELEN
fields.description: The length in spi_mem_clk cycles of dummy phase. The register value shall be (cycle_num-1).

fields.name: USR_ADDR_BITLEN
fields.description: The length in bits of address phase. The register value shall be (bit_num-1).

fields.name: USR_COMMAND_VALUE
fields.description: The value of  command.

fields.name: USR_COMMAND_BITLEN
fields.description: The length in bits of command phase. The register value shall be (bit_num-1)

fields.name: WB_MODE
fields.description: Mode bits in the flash fast read mode  it is combined with spi_mem_fastrd_mode bit.

fields.name: TRANS_END
fields.description: The bit is used to indicate the  spi0_mst_st controlled transmitting is done.

fields.name: TRANS_END_INT_ENA
fields.description: The bit is used to enable the interrupt of  spi0_mst_st controlled transmitting is done.

fields.name: CSPI_ST_TRANS_END
fields.description: The bit is used to indicate the  spi0_slv_st controlled transmitting is done.

fields.name: CSPI_ST_TRANS_END_INT_ENA
fields.description: The bit is used to enable the interrupt of spi0_slv_st controlled transmitting is done.

fields.name: CK_IDLE_EDGE
fields.description: 1: spi clk line is high when idle     0: spi clk line is low when idle

fields.name: CS_KEEP_ACTIVE
fields.description: spi cs line keep low when the bit is set.

fields.name: CACHE_REQ_EN
fields.description: For SPI0, Cache access enable, 1: enable, 0:disable.

fields.name: CACHE_USR_ADDR_4BYTE
fields.description: For SPI0,  cache  read flash with 4 bytes address, 1: enable, 0:disable.

fields.name: CACHE_FLASH_USR_CMD
fields.description: For SPI0,  cache  read flash for user define command, 1: enable, 0:disable.

fields.name: FDIN_DUAL
fields.description: For SPI0 flash, din phase apply 2 signals. 1: enable 0: disable. The bit is the same with spi_mem_fread_dio.

fields.name: FDOUT_DUAL
fields.description: For SPI0 flash, dout phase apply 2 signals. 1: enable 0: disable. The bit is the same with spi_mem_fread_dio.

fields.name: FADDR_DUAL
fields.description: For SPI0 flash, address phase apply 2 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.  The bit is the same with spi_mem_fread_dio.

fields.name: FDIN_QUAD
fields.description: For SPI0 flash, din phase apply 4 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.  The bit is the same with spi_mem_fread_qio.

fields.name: FDOUT_QUAD
fields.description: For SPI0 flash, dout phase apply 4 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.  The bit is the same with spi_mem_fread_qio.

fields.name: FADDR_QUAD
fields.description: For SPI0 flash, address phase apply 4 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.  The bit is the same with spi_mem_fread_qio.

fields.name: CSPI_ST
fields.description: The current status of SPI0 slave FSM: spi0_slv_st. 0: idle state, 1: preparation state, 2: send command state, 3: send address state, 4: wait state, 5: read data state, 6:write data state, 7: done state, 8: read data end state.

fields.name: EM_ST
fields.description: The current status of SPI0 master FSM: spi0_mst_st. 0: idle state, 1:EM_CACHE_GRANT , 2: program/erase suspend state, 3: SPI0 read data state, 4: wait cache/EDMA sent data is stored in SPI0 TX FIFO, 5: SPI0 write data state.

fields.name: CSPI_LOCK_DELAY_TIME
fields.description: The lock delay time of SPI0/1 arbiter by spi0_slv_st, after PER is sent by SPI1.

fields.name: TIMING_CLK_ENA
fields.description: The bit is used to enable timing adjust clock for all reading operations.

fields.name: TIMING_CALI
fields.description: The bit is used to enable timing auto-calibration for all reading operations.

fields.name: EXTRA_DUMMY_CYCLELEN
fields.description: add extra dummy spi clock cycle length for spi clock calibration.

SPI0.name: DIN_MODE
SPI0.description: SPI0 input delay mode control register

fields.name: DIN0_MODE
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by system clock cycles, 0: input without delayed, 1: input with the posedge of clk_apb,2 input with the negedge of clk_apb,  3: input with the posedge of clk_160, 4 input with the negedge of clk_160, 5: input with the spi_clk high edge,  6: input with the spi_clk low edge

fields.name: DIN1_MODE
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by system clock cycles, 0: input without delayed, 1: input with the posedge of clk_apb,2 input with the negedge of clk_apb,  3: input with the posedge of clk_160, 4 input with the negedge of clk_160, 5: input with the spi_clk high edge,  6: input with the spi_clk low edge

fields.name: DIN2_MODE
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by system clock cycles, 0: input without delayed, 1: input with the posedge of clk_apb,2 input with the negedge of clk_apb,  3: input with the posedge of clk_160, 4 input with the negedge of clk_160, 5: input with the spi_clk high edge,  6: input with the spi_clk low edge

fields.name: DIN3_MODE
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by system clock cycles, 0: input without delayed, 1: input with the posedge of clk_apb,2 input with the negedge of clk_apb,  3: input with the posedge of clk_160, 4 input with the negedge of clk_160, 5: input with the spi_clk high edge,  6: input with the spi_clk low edge

SPI0.name: DIN_NUM
SPI0.description: SPI0 input delay number control register

fields.name: DIN0_NUM
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by system clock cycles, 0: delayed by 1 cycle, 1: delayed by 2 cycles,...

fields.name: DIN1_NUM
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by system clock cycles, 0: delayed by 1 cycle, 1: delayed by 2 cycles,...

fields.name: DIN2_NUM
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by system clock cycles, 0: delayed by 1 cycle, 1: delayed by 2 cycles,...

fields.name: DIN3_NUM
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by system clock cycles, 0: delayed by 1 cycle, 1: delayed by 2 cycles,...

SPI0.name: DOUT_MODE
SPI0.description: SPI0 output delay mode control register

fields.name: DOUT0_MODE
fields.description: the output signals are delayed by system clock cycles, 0: output without delayed, 1: output with the posedge of clk_apb,2 output with the negedge of clk_apb, 3: output with the posedge of clk_160,4 output with the negedge of clk_160,5: output with the spi_clk high edge ,6: output with the spi_clk low edge

fields.name: DOUT1_MODE
fields.description: the output signals are delayed by system clock cycles, 0: output without delayed, 1: output with the posedge of clk_apb,2 output with the negedge of clk_apb, 3: output with the posedge of clk_160,4 output with the negedge of clk_160,5: output with the spi_clk high edge ,6: output with the spi_clk low edge

fields.name: DOUT2_MODE
fields.description: the output signals are delayed by system clock cycles, 0: output without delayed, 1: output with the posedge of clk_apb,2 output with the negedge of clk_apb, 3: output with the posedge of clk_160,4 output with the negedge of clk_160,5: output with the spi_clk high edge ,6: output with the spi_clk low edge

fields.name: DOUT3_MODE
fields.description: the output signals are delayed by system clock cycles, 0: output without delayed, 1: output with the posedge of clk_apb,2 output with the negedge of clk_apb, 3: output with the posedge of clk_160,4 output with the negedge of clk_160,5: output with the spi_clk high edge ,6: output with the spi_clk low edge

fields.name: CLK_EN
fields.description: Register clock gate enable signal. 1: Enable. 0: Disable.

fields.name: SPI01_CLK_SEL
fields.description: When the digital system clock selects PLL clock and the frequency of PLL clock is 480MHz, the value of reg_spi01_clk_sel:  0: SPI0/1 module clock (clk) is 80MHz. 1: SPI0/1 module clock (clk) is 120MHz.  2: SPI0/1 module clock (clk) 160MHz. 3: Not used. When the digital system clock selects PLL clock and the frequency of PLL clock is 320MHz, the value of reg_spi01_clk_sel:  0: SPI0/1 module clock (clk) is 80MHz. 1: SPI0/1 module clock (clk) is 80MHz.  2: SPI0/1 module clock (clk) 160MHz. 3: Not used.

fields.name: DATE
fields.description: SPI register version.

fields.name: SPI1_MST_ST
fields.description: The current status of SPI1 master FSM.

fields.name: MSPI_ST
fields.description: The current status of SPI1 slave FSM: mspi_st. 0: idle state, 1: preparation state, 2: send command state, 3: send address state, 4: wait state, 5: read data state, 6:write data state, 7: done state, 8: read data end state.

fields.name: FLASH_PE
fields.description: In user mode, it is set to indicate that program/erase operation will be triggered. The bit is combined with spi_mem_usr bit. The bit will be cleared once the operation done.1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: USR
fields.description: User define command enable.  An operation will be triggered when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done.1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_HPM
fields.description: Drive Flash into high performance mode.  The bit will be cleared once the operation done.1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_RES
fields.description: This bit combined with reg_resandres bit releases Flash from the power-down state or high performance mode and obtains the devices ID. The bit will be cleared once the operation done.1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_DP
fields.description: Drive Flash into power down.  An operation will be triggered when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done.1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_CE
fields.description: Chip erase enable. Chip erase operation will be triggered when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done.1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_BE
fields.description: Block erase enable(32KB) .  Block erase operation will be triggered when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done.1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_SE
fields.description: Sector erase enable(4KB). Sector erase operation will be triggered when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done.1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_PP
fields.description: Page program enable(1 byte ~256 bytes data to be programmed). Page program operation  will be triggered when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done .1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_WRSR
fields.description: Write status register enable.   Write status operation  will be triggered when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done.1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_RDSR
fields.description: Read status register-1.  Read status operation will be triggered when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done.1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_RDID
fields.description: Read JEDEC ID . Read ID command will be sent when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_WRDI
fields.description: Write flash disable. Write disable command will be sent when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_WREN
fields.description: Write flash enable.  Write enable command will be sent when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_READ
fields.description: Read flash enable. Read flash operation will be triggered when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: USR_ADDR_VALUE
fields.description: In user mode, it is the memory address. other then the bit0-bit23 is the memory address, the bit24-bit31 are the byte length of a transfer.

fields.name: FDUMMY_OUT
fields.description: In the dummy phase the signal level of spi is output by the spi controller.

fields.name: FCMD_DUAL
fields.description: Apply 2 signals during command phase 1:enable 0: disable

fields.name: FCMD_QUAD
fields.description: Apply 4 signals during command phase 1:enable 0: disable

fields.name: FCS_CRC_EN
fields.description: For SPI1,  initialize crc32 module before writing encrypted data to flash. Active low.

fields.name: TX_CRC_EN
fields.description: For SPI1,  enable crc32 when writing encrypted data to flash. 1: enable 0:disable

fields.name: FASTRD_MODE
fields.description: This bit enable the bits: spi_mem_fread_qio, spi_mem_fread_dio, spi_mem_fread_qout and spi_mem_fread_dout. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FREAD_DUAL
fields.description: In the read operations, read-data phase apply 2 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: RESANDRES
fields.description: The Device ID is read out to SPI_MEM_RD_STATUS register,  this bit combine with spi_mem_flash_res bit. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: Q_POL
fields.description: The bit is used to set MISO line polarity, 1: high 0, low

fields.name: D_POL
fields.description: The bit is used to set MOSI line polarity, 1: high 0, low

fields.name: FREAD_QUAD
fields.description: In the read operations read-data phase apply 4 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: WP
fields.description: Write protect signal output when SPI is idle.  1: output high, 0: output low.

fields.name: WRSR_2B
fields.description: two bytes data will be written to status register when it is set. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FREAD_DIO
fields.description: In the read operations address phase and read-data phase apply 2 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FREAD_QIO
fields.description: In the read operations address phase and read-data phase apply 4 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: CLK_MODE
fields.description: SPI clock mode bits. 0: SPI clock is off when CS inactive 1: SPI clock is delayed one cycle after CS inactive 2: SPI clock is delayed two cycles after CS inactive 3: SPI clock is alwasy on.

fields.name: CS_HOLD_DLY_RES
fields.description: After RES/DP/HPM command is sent, SPI1 waits (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY_RES[9:0] * 512) SPI_CLK cycles.

fields.name: SYNC_RESET
fields.description: The FSM will be reset.

fields.name: CLKCNT_L
fields.description: In the master mode it must be equal to spi_mem_clkcnt_N.

fields.name: CLKCNT_H
fields.description: In the master mode it must be floor((spi_mem_clkcnt_N+1)/2-1).

fields.name: CLKCNT_N
fields.description: In the master mode it is the divider of spi_mem_clk. So spi_mem_clk frequency is system/(spi_mem_clkcnt_N+1)

fields.name: CLK_EQU_SYSCLK
fields.description: reserved

fields.name: CK_OUT_EDGE
fields.description: the bit combined with spi_mem_mosi_delay_mode bits to set mosi signal delay mode.

fields.name: FWRITE_DUAL
fields.description: In the write operations read-data phase apply 2 signals

fields.name: FWRITE_QUAD
fields.description: In the write operations read-data phase apply 4 signals

fields.name: FWRITE_DIO
fields.description: In the write operations address phase and read-data phase apply 2 signals.

fields.name: FWRITE_QIO
fields.description: In the write operations address phase and read-data phase apply 4 signals.

fields.name: USR_MISO_HIGHPART
fields.description: read-data phase only access to high-part of the buffer spi_mem_w8~spi_mem_w15. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: USR_MOSI_HIGHPART
fields.description: write-data phase only access to high-part of the buffer spi_mem_w8~spi_mem_w15. 1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: USR_DUMMY_IDLE
fields.description: SPI clock is disable in dummy phase when the bit is enable.

fields.name: USR_MOSI
fields.description: This bit enable the write-data phase of an operation.

fields.name: USR_MISO
fields.description: This bit enable the read-data phase of an operation.

fields.name: USR_DUMMY
fields.description: This bit enable the dummy phase of an operation.

fields.name: USR_ADDR
fields.description: This bit enable the address phase of an operation.

fields.name: USR_COMMAND
fields.description: This bit enable the command phase of an operation.

fields.name: USR_DUMMY_CYCLELEN
fields.description: The length in spi_mem_clk cycles of dummy phase. The register value shall be (cycle_num-1).

fields.name: USR_ADDR_BITLEN
fields.description: The length in bits of address phase. The register value shall be (bit_num-1).

fields.name: USR_COMMAND_VALUE
fields.description: The value of  command.

fields.name: USR_COMMAND_BITLEN
fields.description: The length in bits of command phase. The register value shall be (bit_num-1)

SPI1.name: MOSI_DLEN
SPI1.description: SPI1 send data bit length control register.

fields.name: USR_MOSI_DBITLEN
fields.description: The length in bits of write-data. The register value shall be (bit_num-1).

SPI1.name: MISO_DLEN
SPI1.description: SPI1 receive data bit length control register.

fields.name: USR_MISO_DBITLEN
fields.description: The length in bits of  read-data. The register value shall be (bit_num-1).

fields.name: STATUS
fields.description: The value is stored when set spi_mem_flash_rdsr bit and spi_mem_flash_res bit.

fields.name: WB_MODE
fields.description: Mode bits in the flash fast read mode  it is combined with spi_mem_fastrd_mode bit.

fields.name: CS0_DIS
fields.description: SPI_CS0 pin enable, 1: disable SPI_CS0, 0: SPI_CS0 pin is active to select SPI device, such as flash, external RAM and so on.

fields.name: CS1_DIS
fields.description: SPI_CS1 pin enable, 1: disable SPI_CS1, 0: SPI_CS1 pin is active to select SPI device, such as flash, external RAM and so on.

fields.name: CK_IDLE_EDGE
fields.description: 1: spi clk line is high when idle     0: spi clk line is low when idle

fields.name: CS_KEEP_ACTIVE
fields.description: spi cs line keep low when the bit is set.

fields.name: DATA
fields.description: For SPI1, the value of crc32.

fields.name: CACHE_USR_ADDR_4BYTE
fields.description: For SPI1,  cache  read flash with 4 bytes address, 1: enable, 0:disable.

fields.name: FDIN_DUAL
fields.description: For SPI1, din phase apply 2 signals. 1: enable 0: disable. The bit is the same with spi_mem_fread_dio.

fields.name: FDOUT_DUAL
fields.description: For SPI1, dout phase apply 2 signals. 1: enable 0: disable. The bit is the same with spi_mem_fread_dio.

fields.name: FADDR_DUAL
fields.description: For SPI1, address phase apply 2 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.  The bit is the same with spi_mem_fread_dio.

fields.name: FDIN_QUAD
fields.description: For SPI1, din phase apply 4 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.  The bit is the same with spi_mem_fread_qio.

fields.name: FDOUT_QUAD
fields.description: For SPI1, dout phase apply 4 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.  The bit is the same with spi_mem_fread_qio.

fields.name: FADDR_QUAD
fields.description: For SPI1, address phase apply 4 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.  The bit is the same with spi_mem_fread_qio.

fields.description: data buffer

fields.description: data buffer

fields.name: WAITI_DUMMY
fields.description: The dummy phase enable when wait flash idle (RDSR)

fields.name: WAITI_CMD
fields.description: The command to wait flash idle(RDSR).

fields.name: WAITI_DUMMY_CYCLELEN
fields.description: The dummy cycle length when wait flash idle(RDSR).

fields.name: FLASH_PER
fields.description: program erase resume bit, program erase suspend operation will be triggered when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done.1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_PES
fields.description: program erase suspend bit, program erase suspend operation will be triggered when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done.1: enable 0: disable.

fields.name: FLASH_PER_WAIT_EN
fields.description: 1: SPI1 waits (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY_RES[9:0] * 4 or *128) SPI_CLK cycles after program erase resume command is sent. 0: SPI1 does not wait after program erase resume command is sent.

fields.name: FLASH_PES_WAIT_EN
fields.description: 1: SPI1 waits (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY_RES[9:0] * 4 or *128) SPI_CLK cycles after program erase suspend command is sent. 0: SPI1 does not wait after program erase suspend command is sent.

fields.name: PES_PER_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable PES end triggers PER transfer option. If this bit is 0, application should send PER after PES is done.

fields.name: FLASH_PES_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable Auto-suspending function.

fields.name: PESR_END_MSK
fields.description: The mask value when check SUS/SUS1/SUS2 status bit. If the read status value is status_in[15:0](only status_in[7:0] is valid when only one byte of data is read out, status_in[15:0] is valid when two bytes of data are read out), SUS/SUS1/SUS2 = status_in[15:0]^ SPI_MEM_PESR_END_MSK[15:0].

fields.name: RD_SUS_2B
fields.description: 1: Read two bytes when check flash SUS/SUS1/SUS2 status bit. 0:  Read one byte when check flash SUS/SUS1/SUS2 status bit

fields.name: PER_END_EN
fields.description: 1: Both WIP and SUS/SUS1/SUS2 bits should be checked to insure the resume status of flash. 0: Only need to check WIP is 0.

fields.name: PES_END_EN
fields.description: 1: Both WIP and SUS/SUS1/SUS2 bits should be checked to insure the suspend status of flash. 0: Only need to check WIP is 0.

fields.name: SUS_TIMEOUT_CNT
fields.description: When SPI1 checks SUS/SUS1/SUS2 bits fail for SPI_MEM_SUS_TIMEOUT_CNT[6:0] times, it will be treated as check pass.

fields.name: FLASH_PER_COMMAND
fields.description: Program/Erase resume command.

fields.name: FLASH_PES_COMMAND
fields.description: Program/Erase suspend command.

fields.name: WAIT_PESR_COMMAND
fields.description: Flash SUS/SUS1/SUS2 status bit read command. The command should be sent when SUS/SUS1/SUS2 bit should be checked to insure the suspend or resume status of flash.

fields.name: FLASH_SUS
fields.description: The status of flash suspend, only used in SPI1.

fields.name: WAIT_PESR_CMD_2B
fields.description: 1: SPI1 sends out SPI_MEM_WAIT_PESR_COMMAND[15:0] to check SUS/SUS1/SUS2 bit. 0: SPI1 sends out SPI_MEM_WAIT_PESR_COMMAND[7:0] to check SUS/SUS1/SUS2 bit.

fields.name: FLASH_HPM_DLY_128
fields.description: 1: SPI1 waits (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY_RES[9:0] * 128) SPI_CLK cycles after HPM command is sent. 0: SPI1 waits (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY_RES[9:0] * 4) SPI_CLK cycles after HPM command is sent.

fields.name: FLASH_RES_DLY_128
fields.description: 1: SPI1 waits (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY_RES[9:0] * 128) SPI_CLK cycles after RES command is sent. 0: SPI1 waits (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY_RES[9:0] * 4) SPI_CLK cycles after RES command is sent.

fields.name: FLASH_DP_DLY_128
fields.description: 1: SPI1 waits (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY_RES[9:0] * 128) SPI_CLK cycles after DP command is sent. 0: SPI1 waits (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY_RES[9:0] * 4) SPI_CLK cycles after DP command is sent.

fields.name: FLASH_PER_DLY_128
fields.description: Valid when SPI_MEM_FLASH_PER_WAIT_EN is 1. 1: SPI1 waits (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY_RES[9:0] * 128) SPI_CLK cycles after PER command is sent. 0: SPI1 waits (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY_RES[9:0] * 4) SPI_CLK cycles after PER command is sent.

fields.name: FLASH_PES_DLY_128
fields.description: Valid when SPI_MEM_FLASH_PES_WAIT_EN is 1. 1: SPI1 waits (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY_RES[9:0] * 128) SPI_CLK cycles after PES command is sent. 0: SPI1 waits (SPI_MEM_CS_HOLD_DELAY_RES[9:0] * 4) SPI_CLK cycles after PES command is sent.

fields.name: SPI0_LOCK_EN
fields.description: 1: Enable SPI0 lock SPI0/1 arbiter option. 0: Disable it.

fields.name: TIMING_CALI
fields.description: The bit is used to enable timing auto-calibration for all reading operations.

fields.name: EXTRA_DUMMY_CYCLELEN
fields.description: add extra dummy spi clock cycle length for spi clock calibration.

fields.name: PER_END_INT_ENA
fields.description: The enable bit for SPI_MEM_PER_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: PES_END_INT_ENA
fields.description: The enable bit for SPI_MEM_PES_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: WPE_END_INT_ENA
fields.description: The enable bit for SPI_MEM_WPE_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: SLV_ST_END_INT_ENA
fields.description: The enable bit for SPI_MEM_SLV_ST_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: MST_ST_END_INT_ENA
fields.description: The enable bit for SPI_MEM_MST_ST_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: PER_END_INT_CLR
fields.description: The clear bit for SPI_MEM_PER_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: PES_END_INT_CLR
fields.description: The clear bit for SPI_MEM_PES_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: WPE_END_INT_CLR
fields.description: The clear bit for SPI_MEM_WPE_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: SLV_ST_END_INT_CLR
fields.description: The clear bit for SPI_MEM_SLV_ST_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: MST_ST_END_INT_CLR
fields.description: The clear bit for SPI_MEM_MST_ST_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: PER_END_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_MEM_PER_END_INT interrupt. 1: Triggered when Auto Resume command (0x7A) is sent and flash is resumed. 0: Others.

fields.name: PES_END_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_MEM_PES_END_INT interrupt.1: Triggered when Auto Suspend command (0x75) is sent and flash is suspended. 0: Others.

fields.name: WPE_END_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_MEM_WPE_END_INT interrupt. 1: Triggered when WRSR/PP/SE/BE/CE is sent and flash is already idle. 0: Others.

fields.name: SLV_ST_END_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_MEM_SLV_ST_END_INT interrupt. 1: Triggered when spi1_slv_st is changed from non idle state to idle state. It means that SPI_CS raises high. 0: Others

fields.name: MST_ST_END_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_MEM_MST_ST_END_INT interrupt. 1: Triggered when spi1_mst_st is changed from non idle state to idle state. 0: Others.

fields.name: PER_END_INT_ST
fields.description: The status bit for SPI_MEM_PER_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: PES_END_INT_ST
fields.description: The status bit for SPI_MEM_PES_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: WPE_END_INT_ST
fields.description: The status bit for SPI_MEM_WPE_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: SLV_ST_END_INT_ST
fields.description: The status bit for SPI_MEM_SLV_ST_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: MST_ST_END_INT_ST
fields.description: The status bit for SPI_MEM_MST_ST_END_INT interrupt.

fields.name: CLK_EN
fields.description: Register clock gate enable signal. 1: Enable. 0: Disable.

fields.name: DATE
fields.description: Version control register

fields.name: CONF_BITLEN
fields.description: Define the APB cycles of  SPI_CONF state. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: UPDATE
fields.description: Set this bit to synchronize SPI registers from APB clock domain into SPI module clock domain, which is only used in SPI master mode.

fields.name: USR
fields.description: User define command enable.  An operation will be triggered when the bit is set. The bit will be cleared once the operation done.1: enable 0: disable. Can not be changed by CONF_buf.

fields.name: USR_ADDR_VALUE
fields.description: Address to slave. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DUMMY_OUT
fields.description: In the dummy phase the signal level of spi is output by the spi controller. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: FADDR_DUAL
fields.description: Apply 2 signals during addr phase 1:enable 0: disable. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: FADDR_QUAD
fields.description: Apply 4 signals during addr phase 1:enable 0: disable. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: FCMD_DUAL
fields.description: Apply 2 signals during command phase 1:enable 0: disable. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: FCMD_QUAD
fields.description: Apply 4 signals during command phase 1:enable 0: disable. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: FREAD_DUAL
fields.description: In the read operations, read-data phase apply 2 signals. 1: enable 0: disable. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: FREAD_QUAD
fields.description: In the read operations read-data phase apply 4 signals. 1: enable 0: disable.  Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: Q_POL
fields.description: The bit is used to set MISO line polarity, 1: high 0, low. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: D_POL
fields.description: The bit is used to set MOSI line polarity, 1: high 0, low. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: HOLD_POL
fields.description: SPI_HOLD output value when SPI is idle. 1: output high, 0: output low. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: WP_POL
fields.description: Write protect signal output when SPI is idle.  1: output high, 0: output low.  Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: RD_BIT_ORDER
fields.description: In read-data (MISO) phase 1: LSB first 0: MSB first. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: WR_BIT_ORDER
fields.description: In command address write-data (MOSI) phases 1: LSB firs 0: MSB first. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CLKCNT_L
fields.description: In the master mode it must be equal to spi_clkcnt_N. In the slave mode it must be 0. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CLKCNT_H
fields.description: In the master mode it must be floor((spi_clkcnt_N+1)/2-1). In the slave mode it must be 0. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CLKCNT_N
fields.description: In the master mode it is the divider of spi_clk. So spi_clk frequency is system/(spi_clkdiv_pre+1)/(spi_clkcnt_N+1). Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CLKDIV_PRE
fields.description: In the master mode it is pre-divider of spi_clk.  Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CLK_EQU_SYSCLK
fields.description: In the master mode 1: spi_clk is eqaul to system 0: spi_clk is divided from system clock. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DOUTDIN
fields.description: Set the bit to enable full duplex communication. 1: enable 0: disable. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: QPI_MODE
fields.description: Both for master mode and slave mode. 1: spi controller is in QPI mode. 0: others. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: TSCK_I_EDGE
fields.description: In the slave mode, this bit can be used to change the polarity of tsck. 0: tsck = spi_ck_i. 1:tsck = !spi_ck_i.

fields.name: CS_HOLD
fields.description: spi cs keep low when spi is in  done  phase. 1: enable 0: disable. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CS_SETUP
fields.description: spi cs is enable when spi is in  prepare  phase. 1: enable 0: disable. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: RSCK_I_EDGE
fields.description: In the slave mode, this bit can be used to change the polarity of rsck. 0: rsck = !spi_ck_i. 1:rsck = spi_ck_i.

fields.name: CK_OUT_EDGE
fields.description: the bit combined with spi_mosi_delay_mode bits to set mosi signal delay mode. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: FWRITE_DUAL
fields.description: In the write operations read-data phase apply 2 signals. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: FWRITE_QUAD
fields.description: In the write operations read-data phase apply 4 signals. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: USR_CONF_NXT
fields.description: 1: Enable the DMA CONF phase of next seg-trans operation, which means seg-trans will continue. 0: The seg-trans will end after the current SPI seg-trans or this is not seg-trans mode. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: SIO
fields.description: Set the bit to enable 3-line half duplex communication mosi and miso signals share the same pin. 1: enable 0: disable. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: USR_MISO_HIGHPART
fields.description: read-data phase only access to high-part of the buffer spi_w8~spi_w15. 1: enable 0: disable. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: USR_MOSI_HIGHPART
fields.description: write-data phase only access to high-part of the buffer spi_w8~spi_w15. 1: enable 0: disable.  Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: USR_DUMMY_IDLE
fields.description: spi clock is disable in dummy phase when the bit is enable. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: USR_MOSI
fields.description: This bit enable the write-data phase of an operation. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: USR_MISO
fields.description: This bit enable the read-data phase of an operation. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: USR_DUMMY
fields.description: This bit enable the dummy phase of an operation. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: USR_ADDR
fields.description: This bit enable the address phase of an operation. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: USR_COMMAND
fields.description: This bit enable the command phase of an operation. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: USR_DUMMY_CYCLELEN
fields.description: The length in spi_clk cycles of dummy phase. The register value shall be (cycle_num-1). Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: MST_WFULL_ERR_END_EN
fields.description: 1: SPI transfer is ended when SPI RX AFIFO wfull error is valid in GP-SPI master FD/HD-mode. 0: SPI transfer is not ended when SPI RX AFIFO wfull error is valid in GP-SPI master FD/HD-mode.

fields.name: CS_SETUP_TIME
fields.description: (cycles+1) of prepare phase by spi clock this bits are combined with spi_cs_setup bit. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CS_HOLD_TIME
fields.description: delay cycles of cs pin by spi clock this bits are combined with spi_cs_hold bit. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: USR_ADDR_BITLEN
fields.description: The length in bits of address phase. The register value shall be (bit_num-1). Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: USR_COMMAND_VALUE
fields.description: The value of  command. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: MST_REMPTY_ERR_END_EN
fields.description: 1: SPI transfer is ended when SPI TX AFIFO read empty error is valid in GP-SPI master FD/HD-mode. 0: SPI transfer is not ended when SPI TX AFIFO read empty error is valid in GP-SPI master FD/HD-mode.

fields.name: USR_COMMAND_BITLEN
fields.description: The length in bits of command phase. The register value shall be (bit_num-1). Can be configured in CONF state.

SPI2.name: MS_DLEN
SPI2.description: SPI data bit length control register

fields.name: MS_DATA_BITLEN
fields.description: The value of these bits is the configured SPI transmission data bit length in master mode DMA controlled transfer or CPU controlled transfer. The value is also the configured bit length in slave mode DMA RX controlled transfer. The register value shall be (bit_num-1). Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CS0_DIS
fields.description: SPI CS0 pin enable, 1: disable CS0, 0: spi_cs0 signal is from/to CS0 pin. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CS1_DIS
fields.description: SPI CS1 pin enable, 1: disable CS1, 0: spi_cs1 signal is from/to CS1 pin. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CS2_DIS
fields.description: SPI CS2 pin enable, 1: disable CS2, 0: spi_cs2 signal is from/to CS2 pin. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CS3_DIS
fields.description: SPI CS3 pin enable, 1: disable CS3, 0: spi_cs3 signal is from/to CS3 pin. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CS4_DIS
fields.description: SPI CS4 pin enable, 1: disable CS4, 0: spi_cs4 signal is from/to CS4 pin. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CS5_DIS
fields.description: SPI CS5 pin enable, 1: disable CS5, 0: spi_cs5 signal is from/to CS5 pin. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CK_DIS
fields.description: 1: spi clk out disable,  0: spi clk out enable. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: MASTER_CS_POL
fields.description: In the master mode the bits are the polarity of spi cs line, the value is equivalent to spi_cs ^ spi_master_cs_pol. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: SLAVE_CS_POL
fields.description: spi slave input cs polarity select. 1: inv  0: not change. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CK_IDLE_EDGE
fields.description: 1: spi clk line is high when idle     0: spi clk line is low when idle. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CS_KEEP_ACTIVE
fields.description: spi cs line keep low when the bit is set. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: QUAD_DIN_PIN_SWAP
fields.description: 1:  spi quad input swap enable  0:  spi quad input swap disable. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DIN0_MODE
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by SPI module clock cycles, 0: input without delayed, 1: input with the posedge of clk_apb,2 input with the negedge of clk_apb, 3: input with the spi_clk. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DIN1_MODE
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by SPI module clock cycles, 0: input without delayed, 1: input with the posedge of clk_apb,2 input with the negedge of clk_apb, 3: input with the spi_clk. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DIN2_MODE
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by SPI module clock cycles, 0: input without delayed, 1: input with the posedge of clk_apb,2 input with the negedge of clk_apb, 3: input with the spi_clk. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DIN3_MODE
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by SPI module clock cycles, 0: input without delayed, 1: input with the posedge of clk_apb,2 input with the negedge of clk_apb, 3: input with the spi_clk. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: TIMING_HCLK_ACTIVE
fields.description: 1:enable hclk in SPI input timing module.  0: disable it. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DIN0_NUM
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by SPI module clock cycles, 0: delayed by 1 cycle, 1: delayed by 2 cycles,...  Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DIN1_NUM
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by SPI module clock cycles, 0: delayed by 1 cycle, 1: delayed by 2 cycles,...  Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DIN2_NUM
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by SPI module clock cycles, 0: delayed by 1 cycle, 1: delayed by 2 cycles,...  Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DIN3_NUM
fields.description: the input signals are delayed by SPI module clock cycles, 0: delayed by 1 cycle, 1: delayed by 2 cycles,...  Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DOUT0_MODE
fields.description: The output signal 0 is delayed by the SPI module clock, 0: output without delayed, 1: output delay for a SPI module clock cycle at its negative edge. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DOUT1_MODE
fields.description: The output signal 1 is delayed by the SPI module clock, 0: output without delayed, 1: output delay for a SPI module clock cycle at its negative edge. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DOUT2_MODE
fields.description: The output signal 2 is delayed by the SPI module clock, 0: output without delayed, 1: output delay for a SPI module clock cycle at its negative edge. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DOUT3_MODE
fields.description: The output signal 3 is delayed by the SPI module clock, 0: output without delayed, 1: output delay for a SPI module clock cycle at its negative edge. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: DMA_SLV_SEG_TRANS_EN
fields.description: Enable dma segment transfer in spi dma half slave mode. 1: enable. 0: disable.

fields.name: SLV_RX_SEG_TRANS_CLR_EN
fields.description: 1: spi_dma_infifo_full_vld is cleared by spi slave cmd 5. 0: spi_dma_infifo_full_vld is cleared by spi_trans_done.

fields.name: SLV_TX_SEG_TRANS_CLR_EN
fields.description: 1: spi_dma_outfifo_empty_vld is cleared by spi slave cmd 6. 0: spi_dma_outfifo_empty_vld is cleared by spi_trans_done.

fields.name: RX_EOF_EN
fields.description: 1: spi_dma_inlink_eof is set when the number of dma pushed data bytes is equal to the value of spi_slv/mst_dma_rd_bytelen[19:0] in spi dma transition.  0: spi_dma_inlink_eof is set by spi_trans_done in non-seg-trans or spi_dma_seg_trans_done in seg-trans.

fields.name: DMA_RX_ENA
fields.description: Set this bit to enable SPI DMA controlled receive data mode.

fields.name: DMA_TX_ENA
fields.description: Set this bit to enable SPI DMA controlled send data mode.

fields.name: RX_AFIFO_RST
fields.description: Set this bit to reset RX AFIFO, which is used to receive data in SPI master and slave mode transfer.

fields.name: BUF_AFIFO_RST
fields.description: Set this bit to reset BUF TX AFIFO, which is used send data out in SPI slave CPU controlled mode transfer and master mode transfer.

fields.name: DMA_AFIFO_RST
fields.description: Set this bit to reset DMA TX AFIFO, which is used to send data out in SPI slave DMA controlled mode transfer.

fields.name: DMA_INFIFO_FULL_ERR_INT_ENA
fields.description: The enable bit for SPI_DMA_INFIFO_FULL_ERR_INT interrupt.

fields.name: DMA_OUTFIFO_EMPTY_ERR_INT_ENA
fields.description: The enable bit for SPI_DMA_OUTFIFO_EMPTY_ERR_INT interrupt.

fields.name: MST_RX_AFIFO_WFULL_ERR_INT_ENA

fields.description: The enable bit for SPI_APP1_INT interrupt.

fields.description: The clear bit for SPI_DMA_OUTFIFO_EMPTY_ERR_INT interrupt.

fields.name: DMA_INFIFO_FULL_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: 1: The current data rate of DMA Rx is smaller than that of SPI, which will lose the receive data.  0: Others.

fields.name: DMA_OUTFIFO_EMPTY_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: 1: The current data rate of DMA TX is smaller than that of SPI. SPI will stop in master mode and send out all 0 in slave mode.  0: Others.

fields.name: SLV_EX_QPI_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI slave Ex_QPI interrupt. 1: SPI slave mode Ex_QPI transmission is ended. 0: Others.

fields.name: SLV_EN_QPI_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI slave En_QPI interrupt. 1: SPI slave mode En_QPI transmission is ended. 0: Others.

fields.name: SLV_CMD7_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI slave CMD7 interrupt. 1: SPI slave mode CMD7 transmission is ended. 0: Others.

fields.name: SLV_CMD8_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI slave CMD8 interrupt. 1: SPI slave mode CMD8 transmission is ended. 0: Others.

fields.name: SLV_CMD9_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI slave CMD9 interrupt. 1: SPI slave mode CMD9 transmission is ended. 0: Others.

fields.name: SLV_CMDA_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI slave CMDA interrupt. 1: SPI slave mode CMDA transmission is ended. 0: Others.

fields.name: SLV_RD_DMA_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_SLV_RD_DMA_DONE_INT interrupt. 1: SPI slave mode Rd_DMA transmission is ended. 0: Others.

fields.name: SLV_WR_DMA_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_SLV_WR_DMA_DONE_INT interrupt. 1: SPI slave mode Wr_DMA transmission is ended. 0: Others.

fields.name: SLV_RD_BUF_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_SLV_RD_BUF_DONE_INT interrupt. 1: SPI slave mode Rd_BUF transmission is ended. 0: Others.

fields.name: SLV_WR_BUF_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_SLV_WR_BUF_DONE_INT interrupt. 1: SPI slave mode Wr_BUF transmission is ended. 0: Others.

fields.name: TRANS_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_TRANS_DONE_INT interrupt. 1: SPI master mode transmission is ended. 0: others.

fields.name: DMA_SEG_TRANS_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_DMA_SEG_TRANS_DONE_INT interrupt. 1:  spi master DMA full-duplex/half-duplex seg-conf-trans ends or slave half-duplex seg-trans ends. And data has been pushed to corresponding memory.  0:  seg-conf-trans or seg-trans is not ended or not occurred.

fields.name: SEG_MAGIC_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_SEG_MAGIC_ERR_INT interrupt. 1: The magic value in CONF buffer is error in the DMA seg-conf-trans. 0: others.

fields.name: SLV_BUF_ADDR_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_SLV_BUF_ADDR_ERR_INT interrupt. 1: The accessing data address of the current SPI slave mode CPU controlled FD, Wr_BUF or Rd_BUF transmission is bigger than 63. 0: Others.

fields.name: SLV_CMD_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_SLV_CMD_ERR_INT interrupt. 1: The slave command value in the current SPI slave HD mode transmission is not supported. 0: Others.

fields.name: MST_RX_AFIFO_WFULL_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_MST_RX_AFIFO_WFULL_ERR_INT interrupt. 1: There is a RX AFIFO write-full error when SPI inputs data in master mode. 0: Others.

fields.name: MST_TX_AFIFO_REMPTY_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_MST_TX_AFIFO_REMPTY_ERR_INT interrupt. 1: There is a TX BUF AFIFO read-empty error when SPI outputs data in master mode. 0: Others.

fields.name: APP2_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_APP2_INT interrupt. The value is only controlled by application.

fields.name: APP1_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw bit for SPI_APP1_INT interrupt. The value is only controlled by application.

fields.name: DMA_INFIFO_FULL_ERR_INT_ST

fields.name: DMA_OUTFIFO_EMPTY_ERR_INT_ST
