fields.name: CLK_MODE
fields.description: SPI clock mode bits. 0: SPI clock is off when CS inactive 1: SPI clock is delayed one cycle after CS inactive 2: SPI clock is delayed two cycles after CS inactive 3: SPI clock is alwasy on. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: CLK_MODE_13
fields.description: {CPOL, CPHA},1: support spi clk mode 1 and 3, first edge output data B[0]/B[7].  0: support spi clk mode 0 and 2, first edge output data B[1]/B[6].

fields.name: RSCK_DATA_OUT
fields.description: It saves half a cycle when tsck is the same as rsck. 1: output data at rsck posedge   0: output data at tsck posedge

fields.name: SLV_RDDMA_BITLEN_EN
fields.description: 1: SPI_SLV_DATA_BITLEN stores data bit length of master-read-slave data length in DMA controlled mode(Rd_DMA). 0: others

fields.name: SLV_WRDMA_BITLEN_EN
fields.description: 1: SPI_SLV_DATA_BITLEN stores data bit length of master-write-to-slave data length in DMA controlled mode(Wr_DMA). 0: others

fields.name: SLV_RDBUF_BITLEN_EN
fields.description: 1: SPI_SLV_DATA_BITLEN stores data bit length of master-read-slave data length in CPU controlled mode(Rd_BUF). 0: others

fields.name: SLV_WRBUF_BITLEN_EN
fields.description: 1: SPI_SLV_DATA_BITLEN stores data bit length of master-write-to-slave data length in CPU controlled mode(Wr_BUF). 0: others

fields.name: DMA_SEG_MAGIC_VALUE
fields.description: The magic value of BM table in master DMA seg-trans.

fields.name: MODE
fields.description: Set SPI work mode. 1: slave mode 0: master mode.

fields.name: SOFT_RESET
fields.description: Software reset enable, reset the spi clock line cs line and data lines. Can be configured in CONF state.

fields.name: USR_CONF
fields.description: 1: Enable the DMA CONF phase of current seg-trans operation, which means seg-trans will start. 0: This is not seg-trans mode.

fields.name: SLV_DATA_BITLEN
fields.description: The transferred data bit length in SPI slave FD and HD mode.

fields.name: SLV_LAST_COMMAND
fields.description: In the slave mode it is the value of command.

fields.name: SLV_LAST_ADDR
fields.description: In the slave mode it is the value of address.

SPI2.name: CLK_GATE
SPI2.description: SPI module clock and register clock control

fields.name: CLK_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable clk gate

fields.name: MST_CLK_ACTIVE
fields.description: Set this bit to power on the SPI module clock.

fields.name: MST_CLK_SEL
fields.description: This bit is used to select SPI module clock source in master mode. 1: PLL_CLK_80M. 0: XTAL CLK.

fields.name: DATE
fields.description: SPI register version.

fields.name: RESET_MODE
fields.description: This bit is used to configure the operating mode of the TWAI Controller. 1: Reset mode; 0: Operating mode.

fields.name: LISTEN_ONLY_MODE
fields.description: 1: Listen only mode. In this mode the nodes will only receive messages from the bus, without generating the acknowledge signal nor updating the RX error counter.

fields.name: SELF_TEST_MODE
fields.description: 1: Self test mode. In this mode the TX nodes can perform a successful transmission without receiving the acknowledge signal. This mode is often used to test a single node with the self reception request command.

fields.name: RX_FILTER_MODE
fields.description: This bit is used to configure the filter mode. 0: Dual filter mode; 1: Single filter mode.

fields.name: TX_REQ
fields.description: Set the bit to 1 to allow the driving nodes start transmission.

fields.name: ABORT_TX
fields.description: Set the bit to 1 to cancel a pending transmission request.

fields.name: RELEASE_BUF
fields.description: Set the bit to 1 to release the RX buffer.

fields.name: CLR_OVERRUN
fields.description: Set the bit to 1 to clear the data overrun status bit.

fields.name: SELF_RX_REQ
fields.description: Self reception request command. Set the bit to 1 to allow a message be transmitted and received simultaneously.

fields.name: RX_BUF_ST
fields.description: 1: The data in the RX buffer is not empty, with at least one received data packet.

fields.name: OVERRUN_ST
fields.description: 1: The RX FIFO is full and data overrun has occurred.

fields.name: TX_BUF_ST
fields.description: 1: The TX buffer is empty, the CPU may write a message into it.

fields.name: TX_COMPLETE
fields.description: 1: The TWAI controller has successfully received a packet from the bus.

fields.name: RX_ST
fields.description: 1: The TWAI Controller is receiving a message from the bus.

fields.name: TX_ST
fields.description: 1: The TWAI Controller is transmitting a message to the bus.

fields.name: ERR_ST
fields.description: 1: At least one of the RX/TX error counter has reached or exceeded the value set in register TWAI_ERR_WARNING_LIMIT_REG.

fields.name: BUS_OFF_ST
fields.description: 1: In bus-off status, the TWAI Controller is no longer involved in bus activities.

fields.name: MISS_ST
fields.description: This bit reflects whether the data packet in the RX FIFO is complete. 1: The current packet is missing; 0: The current packet is complete

fields.name: RX_INT_ST
fields.description: Receive interrupt. If this bit is set to 1, it indicates there are messages to be handled in the RX FIFO.

fields.name: TX_INT_ST
fields.description: Transmit interrupt. If this bit is set to 1, it indicates the message transmitting mis- sion is finished and a new transmission is able to execute.

fields.name: ERR_WARN_INT_ST
fields.description: Error warning interrupt. If this bit is set to 1, it indicates the error status signal and the bus-off status signal of Status register have changed (e.g., switched from 0 to 1 or from 1 to 0).

fields.name: OVERRUN_INT_ST
fields.description: Data overrun interrupt. If this bit is set to 1, it indicates a data overrun interrupt is generated in the RX FIFO.

fields.name: ERR_PASSIVE_INT_ST
fields.description: Error passive interrupt. If this bit is set to 1, it indicates the TWAI Controller is switched between error active status and error passive status due to the change of error counters.

fields.name: ARB_LOST_INT_ST
fields.description: Arbitration lost interrupt. If this bit is set to 1, it indicates an arbitration lost interrupt is generated.

fields.name: BUS_ERR_INT_ST
fields.description: Error interrupt. If this bit is set to 1, it indicates an error is detected on the bus.

fields.name: RX_INT_ENA
fields.description: Set this bit to 1 to enable receive interrupt.

fields.name: TX_INT_ENA
fields.description: Set this bit to 1 to enable transmit interrupt.

fields.name: ERR_WARN_INT_ENA
fields.description: Set this bit to 1 to enable error warning interrupt.

fields.name: OVERRUN_INT_ENA
fields.description: Set this bit to 1 to enable data overrun interrupt.

fields.name: ERR_PASSIVE_INT_ENA
fields.description: Set this bit to 1 to enable error passive interrupt.

fields.name: ARB_LOST_INT_ENA
fields.description: Set this bit to 1 to enable arbitration lost interrupt.

fields.name: BUS_ERR_INT_ENA
fields.description: Set this bit to 1 to enable error interrupt.

fields.name: BAUD_PRESC
fields.description: Baud Rate Prescaler, determines the frequency dividing ratio.

fields.name: SYNC_JUMP_WIDTH
fields.description: Synchronization Jump Width (SJW), 1 \verb+~+ 14 Tq wide.

fields.name: TIME_SEG1
fields.description: The width of PBS1.

fields.name: TIME_SEG2
fields.description: The width of PBS2.

fields.name: TIME_SAMP
fields.description: The number of sample points. 0: the bus is sampled once; 1: the bus is sampled three times

fields.name: ARB_LOST_CAP
fields.description: This register contains information about the bit position of lost arbitration.

fields.name: ECC_SEGMENT
fields.description: This register contains information about the location of errors, see Table 181 for details.

fields.name: ECC_DIRECTION
fields.description: This register contains information about transmission direction of the node when error occurs. 1: Error occurs when receiving a message; 0: Error occurs when transmitting a message

fields.name: ECC_TYPE
fields.description: This register contains information about error types: 00: bit error; 01: form error; 10: stuff error; 11: other type of error

fields.name: ERR_WARNING_LIMIT
fields.description: Error warning threshold. In the case when any of a error counter value exceeds the threshold, or all the error counter values are below the threshold, an error warning interrupt will be triggered (given the enable signal is valid).

fields.name: RX_ERR_CNT
fields.description: The RX error counter register, reflects value changes under reception status.

fields.name: TX_ERR_CNT
fields.description: The TX error counter register, reflects value changes under transmission status.

fields.name: TX_BYTE_0
fields.description: In reset mode, it is acceptance code register 0 with R/W Permission. In operation mode, it stores the 0th byte of the data to be transmitted or received. In operation mode, writing writes to the transmit buffer while reading reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: TX_BYTE_1
fields.description: In reset mode, it is acceptance code register 1 with R/W Permission. In operation mode, it stores the 1st byte of the data to be transmitted or received. In operation mode, writing writes to the transmit buffer while reading reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: TX_BYTE_2
fields.description: In reset mode, it is acceptance code register 2 with R/W Permission. In operation mode, it stores the 2nd byte of the data to be transmitted or received. In operation mode, writing writes to the transmit buffer while reading reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: TX_BYTE_3
fields.description: In reset mode, it is acceptance code register 3 with R/W Permission. In operation mode, it stores the 3rd byte of the data to be transmitted or received. In operation mode, writing writes to the transmit buffer while reading reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: TX_BYTE_4
fields.description: In reset mode, it is acceptance code register 4 with R/W Permission. In operation mode, it stores the 4th byte of the data to be transmitted or received. In operation mode, writing writes to the transmit buffer while reading reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: TX_BYTE_5
fields.description: In reset mode, it is acceptance code register 5 with R/W Permission. In operation mode, it stores the 5th byte of the data to be transmitted or received. In operation mode, writing writes to the transmit buffer while reading reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: TX_BYTE_6
fields.description: In reset mode, it is acceptance code register 6 with R/W Permission. In operation mode, it stores the 6th byte of the data to be transmitted or received. In operation mode, writing writes to the transmit buffer while reading reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: TX_BYTE_7
fields.description: In reset mode, it is acceptance code register 7 with R/W Permission. In operation mode, it stores the 7th byte of the data to be transmitted or received. In operation mode, writing writes to the transmit buffer while reading reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: TX_BYTE_8
fields.description: In operation mode, it stores the 8th byte of the data to be transmitted or received. In operation mode, writing writes to the transmit buffer while reading reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: TX_BYTE_9
fields.description: In operation mode, it stores the 9th byte of the data to be transmitted or received. In operation mode, writing writes to the transmit buffer while reading reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: TX_BYTE_10
fields.description: In operation mode, it stores the 10th byte of the data to be transmitted or received. In operation mode, writing writes to the transmit buffer while reading reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: TX_BYTE_11
fields.description: In operation mode, it stores the 11th byte of the data to be transmitted or received. In operation mode, writing writes to the transmit buffer while reading reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: TX_BYTE_12
fields.description: In operation mode, it stores the 12th byte of the data to be transmitted or received. In operation mode, writing writes to the transmit buffer while reading reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: RX_MESSAGE_COUNTER
fields.description: This register reflects the number of messages available within the RX FIFO.

fields.name: CD
fields.description: These bits are used to configure frequency dividing coefficients of the external CLKOUT pin.

fields.name: CLOCK_OFF
fields.description: This bit can be configured under reset mode. 1: Disable the external CLKOUT pin; 0: Enable the external CLKOUT pin

fields.name: RXFIFO_RD_BYTE
fields.description: UART 0 accesses FIFO via this register.

fields.name: RXFIFO_FULL_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver receives more data than what rxfifo_full_thrhd specifies.

fields.name: TXFIFO_EMPTY_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when the amount of data in Tx-FIFO is less than what txfifo_empty_thrhd specifies .

fields.name: PARITY_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects a parity error in the data.

fields.name: FRM_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects a data frame error .

fields.name: RXFIFO_OVF_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver receives more data than the FIFO can store.

fields.name: DSR_CHG_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects the edge change of DSRn signal.

fields.name: CTS_CHG_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects the edge change of CTSn signal.

fields.name: BRK_DET_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects a 0 after the stop bit.

fields.name: RXFIFO_TOUT_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver takes more time than rx_tout_thrhd to receive a byte.

fields.name: SW_XON_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver recevies Xon char when uart_sw_flow_con_en is set to 1.

fields.name: SW_XOFF_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver receives Xoff char when uart_sw_flow_con_en is set to 1.

fields.name: GLITCH_DET_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects a glitch in the middle of a start bit.

fields.name: TX_BRK_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when transmitter completes  sending  NULL characters, after all data in Tx-FIFO are sent.

fields.name: TX_BRK_IDLE_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when transmitter has kept the shortest duration after sending the  last data.

fields.name: TX_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when transmitter has send out all data in FIFO.

fields.name: RS485_PARITY_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects a parity error from the echo of transmitter in rs485 mode.

fields.name: RS485_FRM_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects a data frame error from the echo of transmitter in rs485 mode.

fields.name: RS485_CLASH_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when detects a clash between transmitter and receiver in rs485 mode.

fields.name: AT_CMD_CHAR_DET_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects the configured at_cmd char.

fields.name: WAKEUP_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when input rxd edge changes more times than what reg_active_threshold specifies in light sleeping mode.

fields.name: RXFIFO_FULL_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for rxfifo_full_int_raw when rxfifo_full_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: TXFIFO_EMPTY_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for  txfifo_empty_int_raw  when txfifo_empty_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: PARITY_ERR_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for parity_err_int_raw when parity_err_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: FRM_ERR_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for frm_err_int_raw when frm_err_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: RXFIFO_OVF_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for rxfifo_ovf_int_raw when rxfifo_ovf_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: DSR_CHG_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for dsr_chg_int_raw when dsr_chg_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: CTS_CHG_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for cts_chg_int_raw when cts_chg_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: BRK_DET_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for brk_det_int_raw when brk_det_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: RXFIFO_TOUT_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for rxfifo_tout_int_raw when rxfifo_tout_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: SW_XON_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for sw_xon_int_raw when sw_xon_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: SW_XOFF_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for sw_xoff_int_raw when sw_xoff_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: GLITCH_DET_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for glitch_det_int_raw when glitch_det_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: TX_BRK_DONE_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for tx_brk_done_int_raw when tx_brk_done_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: TX_BRK_IDLE_DONE_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the stauts bit for tx_brk_idle_done_int_raw when tx_brk_idle_done_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: TX_DONE_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for tx_done_int_raw when tx_done_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: RS485_PARITY_ERR_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for rs485_parity_err_int_raw when rs485_parity_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: RS485_FRM_ERR_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for rs485_frm_err_int_raw when rs485_fm_err_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: RS485_CLASH_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for rs485_clash_int_raw when rs485_clash_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: AT_CMD_CHAR_DET_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for at_cmd_det_int_raw when at_cmd_char_det_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: WAKEUP_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for uart_wakeup_int_raw when uart_wakeup_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: RXFIFO_FULL_INT_ENA
fields.description: This is the enable bit for rxfifo_full_int_st register.

fields.name: TXFIFO_EMPTY_INT_ENA
fields.description: This is the enable bit for txfifo_empty_int_st register.

fields.name: PARITY_ERR_INT_ENA
fields.description: This is the enable bit for parity_err_int_st register.

fields.name: FRM_ERR_INT_ENA
fields.description: This is the enable bit for frm_err_int_st register.

fields.name: CLKDIV
fields.description: The integral part of the frequency divider factor.

fields.name: FRAG
fields.description: The decimal part of the frequency divider factor.

fields.name: GLITCH_FILT
fields.description: when input pulse width is lower than this value, the pulse is ignored.

fields.name: GLITCH_FILT_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable Rx signal filter.

fields.name: RXFIFO_CNT
fields.description: Stores the byte number of valid data in Rx-FIFO.

fields.name: DSRN
fields.description: The register represent the level value of the internal uart dsr signal.

fields.name: CTSN
fields.description: This register represent the level value of the internal uart cts signal.

fields.name: RXD
fields.description: This register represent the  level value of the internal uart rxd signal.

fields.name: TXFIFO_CNT
fields.description: Stores the byte number of data in Tx-FIFO.

fields.name: DTRN
fields.description: This bit represents the level of the internal uart dtr signal.

fields.name: RTSN
fields.description: This bit represents the level of the internal uart rts signal.

fields.name: TXD
fields.description: This bit represents the  level of the internal uart txd signal.

fields.name: PARITY
fields.description: This register is used to configure the parity check mode.

fields.name: PARITY_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable uart parity check.

fields.name: BIT_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to set the length of data.

fields.name: STOP_BIT_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to set the length of  stop bit.

fields.name: SW_RTS
fields.description: This register is used to configure the software rts signal which is used in software flow control.

fields.name: SW_DTR
fields.description: This register is used to configure the software dtr signal which is used in software flow control.

fields.name: TXD_BRK
fields.description: Set this bit to enbale transmitter to  send NULL when the process of sending data is done.

fields.name: IRDA_DPLX
fields.description: Set this bit to enable IrDA loopback mode.

fields.name: IRDA_TX_EN
fields.description: This is the start enable bit for IrDA transmitter.

fields.name: IRDA_WCTL
fields.description: 1'h1: The IrDA transmitter's 11th bit is the same as 10th bit. 1'h0: Set IrDA transmitter's 11th bit to 0.

fields.name: IRDA_TX_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to invert the level of  IrDA transmitter.

fields.name: IRDA_RX_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to invert the level of IrDA receiver.

fields.name: LOOPBACK
fields.description: Set this bit to enable uart loopback test mode.

fields.name: TX_FLOW_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable flow control function for transmitter.

fields.name: IRDA_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable IrDA protocol.

fields.name: RXFIFO_RST
fields.description: Set this bit to reset the uart receive-FIFO.

fields.name: TXFIFO_RST
fields.description: Set this bit to reset the uart transmit-FIFO.

fields.name: RXD_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to inverse the level value of uart rxd signal.

fields.name: CTS_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to inverse the level value of uart cts signal.

fields.name: DSR_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to inverse the level value of uart dsr signal.

fields.name: TXD_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to inverse the level value of uart txd signal.

fields.name: RTS_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to inverse the level value of uart rts signal.

fields.name: DTR_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to inverse the level value of uart dtr signal.

fields.name: CLK_EN
fields.description: 1'h1: Force clock on for register. 1'h0: Support clock only when application writes registers.

fields.name: ERR_WR_MASK
fields.description: 1'h1: Receiver stops storing data into FIFO when data is wrong. 1'h0: Receiver stores the data even if the  received data is wrong.

fields.name: AUTOBAUD_EN
fields.description: This is the enable bit for detecting baudrate.

fields.name: MEM_CLK_EN
fields.description: UART memory clock gate enable signal.

fields.name: RXFIFO_FULL_THRHD
fields.description: It will produce rxfifo_full_int interrupt when receiver receives more data than this register value.

fields.name: TXFIFO_EMPTY_THRHD
fields.description: It will produce txfifo_empty_int interrupt when the data amount in Tx-FIFO is less than this register value.

fields.name: DIS_RX_DAT_OVF
fields.description: Disable UART Rx data overflow detect.

fields.name: RX_TOUT_FLOW_DIS
fields.description: Set this bit to stop accumulating idle_cnt when hardware flow control works.

fields.name: RX_FLOW_EN
fields.description: This is the flow enable bit for UART receiver.

fields.name: RX_TOUT_EN
fields.description: This is the enble bit for uart receiver's timeout function.

UART0.name: LOWPULSE
UART0.description: Autobaud minimum low pulse duration register

fields.name: MIN_CNT
fields.description: This register stores the value of the minimum duration time of the low level pulse. It is used in baud rate-detect process.

UART0.name: HIGHPULSE
UART0.description: Autobaud minimum high pulse duration register

fields.name: MIN_CNT
fields.description: This register stores  the value of the maxinum duration time for the high level pulse. It is used in baud rate-detect process.

fields.name: RXD_EDGE_CNT
fields.description: This register stores the count of rxd edge change. It is used in baud rate-detect process.

fields.name: SW_FLOW_CON_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable software flow control. It is used with register sw_xon or sw_xoff.

fields.name: XONOFF_DEL
fields.description: Set this bit to remove flow control char from the received data.

fields.name: FORCE_XON
fields.description: Set this bit to enable the transmitter to go on sending data.

fields.name: FORCE_XOFF
fields.description: Set this bit to stop the  transmitter from sending data.

fields.name: SEND_XON
fields.description: Set this bit to send Xon char. It is cleared by hardware automatically.

fields.name: SEND_XOFF
fields.description: Set this bit to send Xoff char. It is cleared by hardware automatically.

fields.name: ACTIVE_THRESHOLD
fields.description: The uart is activated from light sleeping mode when the input rxd edge changes more times than this register value.

fields.name: XOFF_THRESHOLD
fields.description: When the data amount in Rx-FIFO is more than this register value with uart_sw_flow_con_en set to 1, it will send a Xoff char.

fields.name: XOFF_CHAR
fields.description: This register stores the Xoff flow control char.

fields.name: XON_THRESHOLD
fields.description: When the data amount in Rx-FIFO is less than this register value with uart_sw_flow_con_en set to 1, it will send a Xon char.

fields.name: XON_CHAR
fields.description: This register stores the Xon flow control char.

fields.name: TX_BRK_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to configure the number of 0 to be sent after the process of sending data is done. It is active when txd_brk is set to 1.

fields.name: RX_IDLE_THRHD
fields.description: It will produce frame end signal when receiver takes more time to receive one byte data than this register value.

fields.name: TX_IDLE_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to configure the duration time between transfers.

fields.name: RS485_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to choose the rs485 mode.

fields.name: DL0_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to delay the stop bit by 1 bit.

fields.name: DL1_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to delay the stop bit by 1 bit.

fields.name: RS485TX_RX_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable receiver could receive data when the transmitter is transmitting data in rs485 mode.

fields.name: RS485RXBY_TX_EN
fields.description: 1'h1: enable rs485 transmitter to send data when rs485 receiver line is busy.

fields.name: RS485_RX_DLY_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to delay the receiver's internal data signal.

fields.name: RS485_TX_DLY_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to delay the transmitter's internal data signal.

fields.name: PRE_IDLE_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to configure the idle duration time before the first at_cmd is received by receiver.

fields.name: POST_IDLE_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to configure the duration time between the last at_cmd and the next data.

fields.name: RX_GAP_TOUT
fields.description: This register is used to configure the duration time between the at_cmd chars.

fields.name: AT_CMD_CHAR
fields.description: This register is used to configure the content of at_cmd char.

fields.name: CHAR_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to configure the num of continuous at_cmd chars received by receiver.

fields.name: RX_SIZE
fields.description: This register is used to configure the amount of mem allocated for receive-FIFO. The default number is 128 bytes.

fields.name: TX_SIZE
fields.description: This register is used to configure the amount of mem allocated for transmit-FIFO. The default number is 128 bytes.

fields.name: RX_FLOW_THRHD
fields.description: This register is used to configure the maximum amount of data that can be received  when hardware flow control works.

fields.name: RX_TOUT_THRHD
fields.description: This register is used to configure the threshold time that receiver takes to receive one byte. The rxfifo_tout_int interrupt will be trigger when the receiver takes more time to receive one byte with rx_tout_en set to 1.

fields.name: MEM_FORCE_PD
fields.description: Set this bit to force power down UART memory.

fields.name: MEM_FORCE_PU
fields.description: Set this bit to force power up UART memory.

UART0.name: MEM_TX_STATUS
UART0.description: Tx-FIFO write and read offset address.

fields.name: APB_TX_WADDR
fields.description: This register stores the offset address in Tx-FIFO when software writes Tx-FIFO via APB.

fields.name: TX_RADDR
fields.description: This register stores the offset address in Tx-FIFO when Tx-FSM reads data via Tx-FIFO_Ctrl.

UART0.name: MEM_RX_STATUS
UART0.description: Rx-FIFO write and read offset address.

fields.name: APB_RX_RADDR
fields.description: This register stores the offset address in RX-FIFO when software reads data from Rx-FIFO via APB. UART0 is 10'h100. UART1 is 10'h180.

fields.name: RX_WADDR
fields.description: This register stores the offset address in Rx-FIFO when Rx-FIFO_Ctrl writes Rx-FIFO. UART0 is 10'h100. UART1 is 10'h180.

fields.name: ST_URX_OUT
fields.description: This is the status register of receiver.

fields.name: ST_UTX_OUT
fields.description: This is the status register of transmitter.

fields.name: POSEDGE_MIN_CNT
fields.description: This register stores the minimal input clock count between two positive edges. It is used in boudrate-detect process.

fields.name: NEGEDGE_MIN_CNT
fields.description: This register stores the minimal input clock count between two negative edges. It is used in boudrate-detect process.

fields.name: SCLK_DIV_B
fields.description: The  denominator of the frequency divider factor.

fields.name: SCLK_DIV_A
fields.description: The numerator of the frequency divider factor.

fields.name: SCLK_DIV_NUM
fields.description: The integral part of the frequency divider factor.

fields.name: SCLK_SEL
fields.description: UART clock source select. 1: 80Mhz, 2: 8Mhz, 3: XTAL.

fields.name: SCLK_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable UART Tx/Rx clock.

fields.name: RST_CORE
fields.description: Write 1 then write 0 to this bit, reset UART Tx/Rx.

fields.name: TX_SCLK_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable UART Tx clock.

fields.name: RX_SCLK_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable UART Rx clock.

fields.name: TX_RST_CORE
fields.description: Write 1 then write 0 to this bit, reset UART Tx.

fields.name: RX_RST_CORE
fields.description: Write 1 then write 0 to this bit, reset UART Rx.

fields.name: DATE
fields.description: This is the version register.

fields.name: ID
fields.description: This register is used to configure the uart_id.

fields.name: HIGH_SPEED
fields.description: This bit used to select synchronize mode. 1: Registers are auto synchronized into UART Core clock and UART core should be keep the same with APB clock. 0: After configure registers, software needs to write 1 to UART_REG_UPDATE to synchronize registers.

fields.name: REG_UPDATE
fields.description: Software write 1 would synchronize registers into UART Core clock domain and would be cleared by hardware after synchronization is done.

fields.name: RXFIFO_RD_BYTE
fields.description: UART 0 accesses FIFO via this register.

fields.name: RXFIFO_FULL_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver receives more data than what rxfifo_full_thrhd specifies.

fields.name: TXFIFO_EMPTY_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when the amount of data in Tx-FIFO is less than what txfifo_empty_thrhd specifies .

fields.name: PARITY_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects a parity error in the data.

fields.name: FRM_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects a data frame error .

fields.name: RXFIFO_OVF_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver receives more data than the FIFO can store.

fields.name: DSR_CHG_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects the edge change of DSRn signal.

fields.name: CTS_CHG_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects the edge change of CTSn signal.

fields.name: BRK_DET_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects a 0 after the stop bit.

fields.name: RXFIFO_TOUT_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver takes more time than rx_tout_thrhd to receive a byte.

fields.name: SW_XON_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver recevies Xon char when uart_sw_flow_con_en is set to 1.

fields.name: SW_XOFF_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver receives Xoff char when uart_sw_flow_con_en is set to 1.

fields.name: GLITCH_DET_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects a glitch in the middle of a start bit.

fields.name: TX_BRK_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when transmitter completes  sending  NULL characters, after all data in Tx-FIFO are sent.

fields.name: TX_BRK_IDLE_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when transmitter has kept the shortest duration after sending the  last data.

fields.name: TX_DONE_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when transmitter has send out all data in FIFO.

fields.name: RS485_PARITY_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects a parity error from the echo of transmitter in rs485 mode.

fields.name: RS485_FRM_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects a data frame error from the echo of transmitter in rs485 mode.

fields.name: RS485_CLASH_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when detects a clash between transmitter and receiver in rs485 mode.

fields.name: AT_CMD_CHAR_DET_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when receiver detects the configured at_cmd char.

fields.name: WAKEUP_INT_RAW
fields.description: This interrupt raw bit turns to high level when input rxd edge changes more times than what reg_active_threshold specifies in light sleeping mode.

fields.name: RXFIFO_FULL_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for rxfifo_full_int_raw when rxfifo_full_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: TXFIFO_EMPTY_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for  txfifo_empty_int_raw  when txfifo_empty_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: PARITY_ERR_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for parity_err_int_raw when parity_err_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.description: This is the status bit for frm_err_int_raw when frm_err_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.description: This is the status bit for sw_xon_int_raw when sw_xon_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.description: This is the status bit for sw_xoff_int_raw when sw_xoff_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: GLITCH_DET_INT_ST

fields.name: TX_BRK_DONE_INT_ST

fields.name: TX_BRK_IDLE_DONE_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the stauts bit for tx_brk_idle_done_int_raw when tx_brk_idle_done_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: TX_DONE_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for tx_done_int_raw when tx_done_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: RS485_PARITY_ERR_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for rs485_parity_err_int_raw when rs485_parity_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: RS485_FRM_ERR_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for rs485_frm_err_int_raw when rs485_fm_err_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: RS485_CLASH_INT_ST
fields.description: This is the status bit for rs485_clash_int_raw when rs485_clash_int_ena is set to 1.

fields.name: BRK_DET_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the brk_det_int_raw interrupt.

fields.name: RXFIFO_TOUT_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the rxfifo_tout_int_raw interrupt.

fields.name: SW_XON_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the sw_xon_int_raw interrupt.

fields.name: SW_XOFF_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the sw_xoff_int_raw interrupt.

fields.name: GLITCH_DET_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the glitch_det_int_raw interrupt.

fields.name: TX_BRK_DONE_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the tx_brk_done_int_raw interrupt..

fields.name: TX_BRK_IDLE_DONE_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the tx_brk_idle_done_int_raw interrupt.

fields.name: TX_DONE_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the tx_done_int_raw interrupt.

fields.name: RS485_PARITY_ERR_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the rs485_parity_err_int_raw interrupt.

fields.name: RS485_FRM_ERR_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the rs485_frm_err_int_raw interrupt.

fields.name: RS485_CLASH_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the rs485_clash_int_raw interrupt.

fields.name: AT_CMD_CHAR_DET_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the at_cmd_char_det_int_raw interrupt.

fields.name: WAKEUP_INT_CLR
fields.description: Set this bit to clear the uart_wakeup_int_raw interrupt.

fields.name: CLKDIV
fields.description: The integral part of the frequency divider factor.

fields.name: FRAG
fields.description: The decimal part of the frequency divider factor.

fields.name: GLITCH_FILT
fields.description: when input pulse width is lower than this value, the pulse is ignored.

fields.name: GLITCH_FILT_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable Rx signal filter.

fields.name: RXFIFO_CNT
fields.description: Stores the byte number of valid data in Rx-FIFO.

fields.name: DSRN
fields.description: The register represent the level value of the internal uart dsr signal.

fields.name: CTSN
fields.description: This register represent the level value of the internal uart cts signal.

fields.name: RXD
fields.description: This register represent the  level value of the internal uart rxd signal.

fields.name: TXFIFO_CNT
fields.description: Stores the byte number of data in Tx-FIFO.

fields.name: DTRN
fields.description: This bit represents the level of the internal uart dtr signal.

fields.name: RTSN
fields.description: This bit represents the level of the internal uart rts signal.

fields.name: TXD
fields.description: This bit represents the  level of the internal uart txd signal.

fields.name: PARITY
fields.description: This register is used to configure the parity check mode.

fields.name: PARITY_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable uart parity check.

fields.name: BIT_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to set the length of data.

fields.name: STOP_BIT_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to set the length of  stop bit.

fields.name: SW_RTS
fields.description: This register is used to configure the software rts signal which is used in software flow control.

fields.name: SW_DTR
fields.description: This register is used to configure the software dtr signal which is used in software flow control.

fields.name: TXD_BRK
fields.description: Set this bit to enbale transmitter to  send NULL when the process of sending data is done.

fields.name: IRDA_DPLX
fields.description: Set this bit to enable IrDA loopback mode.

fields.name: IRDA_TX_EN
fields.description: This is the start enable bit for IrDA transmitter.

fields.name: IRDA_WCTL
fields.description: 1'h1: The IrDA transmitter's 11th bit is the same as 10th bit. 1'h0: Set IrDA transmitter's 11th bit to 0.

fields.name: IRDA_TX_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to invert the level of  IrDA transmitter.

fields.name: IRDA_RX_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to invert the level of IrDA receiver.

fields.name: LOOPBACK
fields.description: Set this bit to enable uart loopback test mode.

fields.name: TX_FLOW_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable flow control function for transmitter.

fields.name: IRDA_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable IrDA protocol.

fields.name: RXFIFO_RST
fields.description: Set this bit to reset the uart receive-FIFO.

fields.name: TXFIFO_RST
fields.description: Set this bit to reset the uart transmit-FIFO.

fields.name: RXD_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to inverse the level value of uart rxd signal.

fields.name: CTS_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to inverse the level value of uart cts signal.

fields.name: DSR_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to inverse the level value of uart dsr signal.

fields.name: TXD_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to inverse the level value of uart txd signal.

fields.name: RTS_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to inverse the level value of uart rts signal.

fields.name: DTR_INV
fields.description: Set this bit to inverse the level value of uart dtr signal.

fields.name: CLK_EN
fields.description: 1'h1: Force clock on for register. 1'h0: Support clock only when application writes registers.

fields.name: ERR_WR_MASK
fields.description: 1'h1: Receiver stops storing data into FIFO when data is wrong. 1'h0: Receiver stores the data even if the  received data is wrong.

fields.name: AUTOBAUD_EN
fields.description: This is the enable bit for detecting baudrate.

fields.name: MEM_CLK_EN
fields.description: UART memory clock gate enable signal.

fields.name: RXFIFO_FULL_THRHD
fields.description: It will produce rxfifo_full_int interrupt when receiver receives more data than this register value.

fields.name: TXFIFO_EMPTY_THRHD
fields.description: It will produce txfifo_empty_int interrupt when the data amount in Tx-FIFO is less than this register value.

fields.name: DIS_RX_DAT_OVF
fields.description: Disable UART Rx data overflow detect.

fields.name: RX_TOUT_FLOW_DIS
fields.description: Set this bit to stop accumulating idle_cnt when hardware flow control works.

fields.name: RX_FLOW_EN
fields.description: This is the flow enable bit for UART receiver.

fields.name: RX_TOUT_EN
fields.description: This is the enble bit for uart receiver's timeout function.

UART1.name: LOWPULSE
UART1.description: Autobaud minimum low pulse duration register

fields.name: MIN_CNT
fields.description: This register stores the value of the minimum duration time of the low level pulse. It is used in baud rate-detect process.

UART1.name: HIGHPULSE
UART1.description: Autobaud minimum high pulse duration register

fields.name: MIN_CNT
fields.description: This register stores  the value of the maxinum duration time for the high level pulse. It is used in baud rate-detect process.

fields.name: RXD_EDGE_CNT
fields.description: This register stores the count of rxd edge change. It is used in baud rate-detect process.

fields.name: SW_FLOW_CON_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable software flow control. It is used with register sw_xon or sw_xoff.

fields.name: XONOFF_DEL
fields.description: Set this bit to remove flow control char from the received data.

fields.name: FORCE_XON
fields.description: Set this bit to enable the transmitter to go on sending data.

fields.name: FORCE_XOFF
fields.description: Set this bit to stop the  transmitter from sending data.

fields.name: SEND_XON
fields.description: Set this bit to send Xon char. It is cleared by hardware automatically.

fields.name: SEND_XOFF
fields.description: Set this bit to send Xoff char. It is cleared by hardware automatically.

fields.name: ACTIVE_THRESHOLD
fields.description: The uart is activated from light sleeping mode when the input rxd edge changes more times than this register value.

fields.name: XOFF_THRESHOLD
fields.description: When the data amount in Rx-FIFO is more than this register value with uart_sw_flow_con_en set to 1, it will send a Xoff char.

fields.name: XOFF_CHAR
fields.description: This register stores the Xoff flow control char.

fields.name: XON_THRESHOLD
fields.description: When the data amount in Rx-FIFO is less than this register value with uart_sw_flow_con_en set to 1, it will send a Xon char.

fields.name: XON_CHAR
fields.description: This register stores the Xon flow control char.

fields.name: TX_BRK_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to configure the number of 0 to be sent after the process of sending data is done. It is active when txd_brk is set to 1.

fields.name: RX_IDLE_THRHD
fields.description: It will produce frame end signal when receiver takes more time to receive one byte data than this register value.

fields.name: TX_IDLE_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to configure the duration time between transfers.

fields.name: RS485_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to choose the rs485 mode.

fields.name: DL0_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to delay the stop bit by 1 bit.

fields.name: DL1_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to delay the stop bit by 1 bit.

fields.name: RS485TX_RX_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable receiver could receive data when the transmitter is transmitting data in rs485 mode.

fields.name: RS485RXBY_TX_EN
fields.description: 1'h1: enable rs485 transmitter to send data when rs485 receiver line is busy.

fields.name: RS485_RX_DLY_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to delay the receiver's internal data signal.

fields.name: RS485_TX_DLY_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to delay the transmitter's internal data signal.

fields.name: PRE_IDLE_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to configure the idle duration time before the first at_cmd is received by receiver.

fields.name: POST_IDLE_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to configure the duration time between the last at_cmd and the next data.

fields.name: RX_GAP_TOUT
fields.description: This register is used to configure the duration time between the at_cmd chars.

fields.name: AT_CMD_CHAR
fields.description: This register is used to configure the content of at_cmd char.

fields.name: CHAR_NUM
fields.description: This register is used to configure the num of continuous at_cmd chars received by receiver.

fields.name: RX_SIZE
fields.description: This register is used to configure the amount of mem allocated for receive-FIFO. The default number is 128 bytes.

fields.name: TX_SIZE
fields.description: This register is used to configure the amount of mem allocated for transmit-FIFO. The default number is 128 bytes.

fields.name: RX_FLOW_THRHD
fields.description: This register is used to configure the maximum amount of data that can be received  when hardware flow control works.

fields.name: RX_TOUT_THRHD
fields.description: This register is used to configure the threshold time that receiver takes to receive one byte. The rxfifo_tout_int interrupt will be trigger when the receiver takes more time to receive one byte with rx_tout_en set to 1.

fields.name: MEM_FORCE_PD
fields.description: Set this bit to force power down UART memory.

fields.name: MEM_FORCE_PU
fields.description: Set this bit to force power up UART memory.

UART1.name: MEM_TX_STATUS
UART1.description: Tx-FIFO write and read offset address.

fields.name: APB_TX_WADDR
fields.description: This register stores the offset address in Tx-FIFO when software writes Tx-FIFO via APB.

fields.name: TX_RADDR
fields.description: This register stores the offset address in Tx-FIFO when Tx-FSM reads data via Tx-FIFO_Ctrl.

UART1.name: MEM_RX_STATUS
UART1.description: Rx-FIFO write and read offset address.

fields.name: APB_RX_RADDR
fields.description: This register stores the offset address in RX-FIFO when software reads data from Rx-FIFO via APB. UART0 is 10'h100. UART1 is 10'h180.

fields.name: RX_WADDR
fields.description: This register stores the offset address in Rx-FIFO when Rx-FIFO_Ctrl writes Rx-FIFO. UART0 is 10'h100. UART1 is 10'h180.

fields.name: ST_URX_OUT
fields.description: This is the status register of receiver.

fields.name: ST_UTX_OUT
fields.description: This is the status register of transmitter.

fields.name: POSEDGE_MIN_CNT
fields.description: This register stores the minimal input clock count between two positive edges. It is used in boudrate-detect process.

fields.name: NEGEDGE_MIN_CNT
fields.description: This register stores the minimal input clock count between two negative edges. It is used in boudrate-detect process.

fields.name: SCLK_DIV_B
fields.description: The  denominator of the frequency divider factor.

fields.name: SCLK_DIV_A
fields.description: The numerator of the frequency divider factor.

fields.name: SCLK_DIV_NUM
fields.description: The integral part of the frequency divider factor.

fields.name: SCLK_SEL
fields.description: UART clock source select. 1: 80Mhz, 2: 8Mhz, 3: XTAL.

fields.name: SCLK_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable UART Tx/Rx clock.

fields.name: RST_CORE
fields.description: Write 1 then write 0 to this bit, reset UART Tx/Rx.

fields.name: TX_SCLK_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable UART Tx clock.

fields.name: RX_SCLK_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable UART Rx clock.

fields.name: TX_RST_CORE
fields.description: Write 1 then write 0 to this bit, reset UART Tx.

fields.name: RX_RST_CORE
fields.description: Write 1 then write 0 to this bit, reset UART Rx.

fields.name: DATE
fields.description: This is the version register.

fields.name: ID
fields.description: This register is used to configure the uart_id.

fields.name: HIGH_SPEED
fields.description: This bit used to select synchronize mode. 1: Registers are auto synchronized into UART Core clock and UART core should be keep the same with APB clock. 0: After configure registers, software needs to write 1 to UART_REG_UPDATE to synchronize registers.

fields.name: REG_UPDATE
fields.description: Software write 1 would synchronize registers into UART Core clock domain and would be cleared by hardware after synchronization is done.

fields.name: TX_RST
fields.description: Write 1, then write 0 to this bit to reset decode state machine.

fields.name: RX_RST
fields.description: Write 1, then write 0 to this bit to reset encode state machine.

fields.name: UART0_CE
fields.description: Set this bit to link up HCI and UART0.

fields.name: UART1_CE
fields.description: Set this bit to link up HCI and UART1.

fields.name: SEPER_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to separate the data frame using a special char.

fields.name: HEAD_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to encode the data packet with a formatting header.

fields.name: CRC_REC_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable UHCI to receive the 16 bit CRC.

fields.name: UART_IDLE_EOF_EN
fields.description: If this bit is set to 1, UHCI will end the payload receiving process when UART has been in idle state.

fields.name: LEN_EOF_EN
fields.description: If this bit is set to 1, UHCI decoder receiving payload data is end when the receiving byte count has reached the specified value. The value is payload length indicated by UHCI packet header when UHCI_HEAD_EN is 1 or the value is configuration value when UHCI_HEAD_EN is 0. If this bit is set to 0, UHCI decoder receiving payload data is end when 0xc0 is received.

fields.name: ENCODE_CRC_EN
fields.description: Set this bit to enable data integrity checking by appending a 16 bit CCITT-CRC to end of the payload.

fields.name: CLK_EN
fields.description: 1'b1: Force clock on for register. 1'b0: Support clock only when application writes registers.

fields.name: UART_RX_BRK_EOF_EN
fields.description: If this bit is set to 1, UHCI will end payload receive process when NULL frame is received by UART.

fields.name: RDWR_BYTE
fields.description: Write and read byte data to/from UART Tx/Rx FIFO through this field. When USB_DEVICE_SERIAL_IN_EMPTY_INT is set, then user can write data (up to 64 bytes) into UART Tx FIFO. When USB_DEVICE_SERIAL_OUT_RECV_PKT_INT is set, user can check USB_DEVICE_OUT_EP1_WR_ADDR USB_DEVICE_OUT_EP0_RD_ADDR to know how many data is received, then read data from UART Rx FIFO.

fields.name: WR_DONE
fields.description: Set this bit to indicate writing byte data to UART Tx FIFO is done.

fields.name: SERIAL_IN_EP_DATA_FREE
fields.description: 1'b1: Indicate UART Tx FIFO is not full and can write data into in. After writing USB_DEVICE_WR_DONE, this bit would be 0 until data in UART Tx FIFO is read by USB Host.

fields.name: SERIAL_OUT_EP_DATA_AVAIL
fields.description: 1'b1: Indicate there is data in UART Rx FIFO.

fields.name: JTAG_IN_FLUSH_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when flush cmd is received for IN endpoint 2 of JTAG.

fields.name: SOF_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when SOF frame is received.

fields.name: SERIAL_OUT_RECV_PKT_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when Serial Port OUT Endpoint received one packet.

fields.name: SERIAL_IN_EMPTY_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when Serial Port IN Endpoint is empty.

fields.name: PID_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when pid error is detected.

fields.name: CRC5_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when CRC5 error is detected.

fields.name: CRC16_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when CRC16 error is detected.

fields.name: STUFF_ERR_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when stuff error is detected.

fields.name: IN_TOKEN_REC_IN_EP1_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when IN token for IN endpoint 1 is received.

fields.name: USB_BUS_RESET_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when usb bus reset is detected.

fields.name: OUT_EP1_ZERO_PAYLOAD_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when OUT endpoint 1 received packet with zero palyload.

fields.name: OUT_EP2_ZERO_PAYLOAD_INT_RAW
fields.description: The raw interrupt bit turns to high level when OUT endpoint 2 received packet with zero palyload.

fields.description: JTAT in fifo counter.

fields.description: 1: JTAG in fifo is empty.

fields.description: 1: JTAG in fifo is full.

fields.description: 1: JTAG out fifo is empty.

fields.description: Write 1 to reset JTAG in fifo.

fields.name: OUT_FIFO_RESET
fields.description: Write 1 to reset JTAG out fifo.

fields.description: Frame index of received SOF frame.

fields.description: Write data address of IN endpoint 0.

fields.description: Write data address of IN endpoint 2.

fields.name: OUT_EP0_STATE
fields.description: State of OUT Endpoint 0.

fields.name: OUT_EP0_WR_ADDR
fields.description: Write data address of OUT endpoint 0. When USB_DEVICE_SERIAL_OUT_RECV_PKT_INT is detected, there are USB_DEVICE_OUT_EP0_WR_ADDR-2 bytes data in OUT EP0.

fields.name: OUT_EP0_RD_ADDR
fields.description: Read data address of OUT endpoint 0.

fields.name: OUT_EP1_STATE
fields.description: State of OUT Endpoint 1.

fields.name: OUT_EP1_WR_ADDR
fields.description: Write data address of OUT endpoint 1. When USB_DEVICE_SERIAL_OUT_RECV_PKT_INT is detected, there are USB_DEVICE_OUT_EP1_WR_ADDR-2 bytes data in OUT EP1.

fields.name: OUT_EP1_RD_ADDR
fields.description: Read data address of OUT endpoint 1.

fields.name: OUT_EP1_REC_DATA_CNT
fields.description: Data count in OUT endpoint 1 when one packet is received.

fields.name: OUT_EP2_STATE
fields.description: State of OUT Endpoint 2.

fields.name: OUT_EP2_WR_ADDR
fields.description: Write data address of OUT endpoint 2. When USB_DEVICE_SERIAL_OUT_RECV_PKT_INT is detected, there are USB_DEVICE_OUT_EP2_WR_ADDR-2 bytes data in OUT EP2.

fields.name: OUT_EP2_RD_ADDR
fields.description: Read data address of OUT endpoint 2.

fields.name: CLK_EN
fields.description: 1'h1: Force clock on for register. 1'h0: Support clock only when application writes registers.

fields.name: USB_MEM_PD
fields.description: 1: power down usb memory.

fields.name: USB_MEM_CLK_EN
fields.description: 1: Force clock on for usb memory.

fields.name: DATE
fields.description: register version.

fields.name: LINESIZE
fields.description: This bit stores the line size parameter. 0: 16Byte, 1: 32Byte.

fields.name: DESTINATION
fields.description: This bit stores the destination. 0: flash(default). 1: reserved.

fields.name: PHYSICAL_ADDRESS
fields.description: Those bits stores the physical address. If linesize is 16-byte, the physical address should be aligned of 16 bytes. If linesize is 32-byte, the physical address should be aligned of 32 bytes.

fields.name: TRIGGER
fields.description: Set this bit to start manual encryption calculation

fields.name: RELEASE
fields.description: Set this bit to release the manual encrypted result, after that the result will be visible to spi

fields.name: DESTROY
fields.description: Set this bit to destroy XTS-AES result.

fields.name: STATE
fields.description: Those bits shows XTS-AES status. 0=IDLE, 1=WORK, 2=RELEASE, 3=USE. IDLE means that XTS-AES is idle. WORK means that XTS-AES is busy with calculation. RELEASE means the encrypted result is generated but not visible to mspi. USE means that the encrypted result is visible to mspi.

fields.name: DATE
fields.description: Those bits stores the version information of XTS-AES.
